Given I am an Clinician with an active user record where Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true) on my user record *is* populated
When I navigate to the HC Portal login screen
Then I shall have the ability to input an email address
And if I am an active Clinician with a Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true), then I can Sign in with Okta to access the HC Portal

AC2: Clinician *without* a Federation ID
Given I am a Clinician with an active user record where Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true) on my user record *is* *NOT* populated
When I navigate to the HC Portal login screen
Then I shall have the ability to input an email address
And if I am an active Clinician without a Federation ID (Is Single Sign-On Enabled = true), then I can Sign in with the Password I manually created.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3557, PR1050558-3558 [https://lucid.app/lucidchart/3e2874f0-f9bf-4fa1-8510-7474dc192fb4/edit?viewport_loc=685%2C-134%2C3062%2C1543%2C0_0&invitationId=inv_16c3408e-a23f-43cc-b337-68cc38c29be9|https://lucid.app/lucidchart/3e2874f0-f9bf-4fa1-8510-7474dc192fb4/edit?viewport_loc=685%2C-134%2C3062%2C1543%2C0_0&invitationId=inv_16c3408e-a23f-43cc-b337-68cc38c29be9|smart-link]

Record triggered flow on Contract
When executed and RecordType is Clinician, and User associated with Clinician person account does not have fedId
Then create platform event
All the fields mentioned exist on Clinician Person account in DD.
For address - user Mailing address’s zip code.

Create new platform event object - Clinician Onboarding
PE Record / Channel - Okta Onboarding
Value for Type - Okta Onboarding


Since we the Encrypted field Type cannot be changed, create a new field and re point the field in all location that SSN Locked is referred. Communicate to SCP about the new field and ask Brian Lavin to add the SSN Locked to the field cleanup list 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1:
Given I am an Integration User in the HC org
When a Contract record where Record Type = ‘Clinician’ AND Status = ‘Executed’ AND ‘Federation ID’ is not populated (send once per clinician)
Create a custom Platform Event with the following:

* Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding
** Global Provider Id
** SSN (last 4 digits)
** Zipcode
** Phone

Assumptions:

* API handles duplicates
* We are only creating platform event when “Federation ID” is blank. Clinician Offboarding process should be clearing the Federation ID on the user record and deactivating the user in SF.
* Okta will update the User’s ‘Federation ID’ & 'Email'

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project -AC1: Update Field Layout for- *-Contract Type = Master-* [Master is covered under story [+PR1050558-3022+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3022]]
-Given I am a System Administrator-
-When I am on the- *-Contract (RT: Client Contract)-*
-And- *-Contract Type = Master-*
-Then the layout should be updated to only display the “Contract Overview” & “Key Dates” sections and fields when- *-Contract Type = Master-* -(see- [+-Data Dictionary-+|https://schumachergroup-my.sharepoint.com/:x:/g/personal/kirstin_kode_tsged_com/EWZLV5-7O3hFsIQNtBX6rKwBHj1ZjaKmvaLN-yrIEm-QCw] -for layout)-

{color:#0747a6}Per the solution/design: on the client contract record, there will be a ‘Configurations’ tab. On the ‘Configurations’ tab the user can view, add, edit and delete configurations. This story has been modified to support{color}{color:#0747a6}*viewing & delete configurations*{color}{color:#0747a6}. Note: the ‘Add Configuration’ button is covered under the create new client contract story {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3023|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3023|smart-link] {color:#0747a6}and Edit is covered under{color} [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3924|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3924|smart-link] {color:#0747a6}(see mock below){color}

{color:#0747a6}AC1: (requirements split from story {color}[+PR1050558-3022+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3022])
{color:#0747a6}Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#0747a6}When I select a Client Contract{color}
{color:#0747a6}Then on {color}{color:#0747a6}*tab = Configurations*{color}{color:#0747a6}, I shall have the ability to view the following sections (expanded by default){color}

* {color:#0747a6}Term & Renewal{color}
* {color:#0747a6}Compensation{color}
* {color:#0747a6}Protection{color}
* {color:#0747a6}Insurance{color}
* {color:#0747a6}Special Terms{color}
* {color:#0747a6}Legal Terms{color}
* {color:#0747a6}Termination{color}

{color:#0747a6}And within each section I can see high-level details about each record (Name and related Provider Network Contracts Service Account name){color}
{color:#0747a6}And on each record, I can see a “View” option{color}

AC2: Update Field Layout for *Contract Type = Term & Renewals*
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I am on the *Contract (RT: Client Contract)*
-And- *-Contract Type = Term & Renewals-*

{color:#0747a6}And the user clicks ‘View’ on a specific record{color}

{color:#0747a6}AC9: Edit an existing records for Draft Contracts (requirements split from story {color}[+PR1050558-3023+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3023]+,+ {color:#0747a6}*Edit has been split to story*{color}{color:#0747a6} {color}[{color:#0747a6}*PR1050558-3924*{color}|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3924]{color:#0747a6}*due to story point size*{color})
{color:#0747a6}-Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps-{color}
{color:#0747a6}-When I am on the-{color}{color:#0747a6} {color}{color:#0747a6}*-Contract (RT: Client Contract)-*{color}{color:#0747a6} {color}
{color:#0747a6}-And-{color} {color:#0747a6}*-Status = “Draft”-*{color}
{color:#0747a6}-And I am on the ‘Configurations’ tab-{color}
{color:#0747a6}-Then I shall have the ability to “-{color}{color:#0747a6}*-Edit-*{color}{color:#0747a6}-” a specific record-{color} {color:#0747a6}-(if Client Contract status is ≠ Draft, then user can NOT “Edit” )-{color}
{color:#0747a6}-And if I select “Edit” then user can edit fields-{color}
{color:#0747a6}-And-{color} {color:#0747a6}-Navigation options are:-{color}

* {color:#0747a6}-Cancel-{color}
** {color:#0747a6}-No updates saved-{color}
* {color:#0747a6}-Next-{color}

{color:#0747a6}-And user has the ability to link Service Account(s)[linked via Provider Network Contract (PNC) record(s)]-{color}

* {color:#0747a6}-Service Account(s) that can be linked, must be linked to this Contract-{color}{color:#0747a6} {color}
* {color:#0747a6}-Service Account(s) can NOT be linked to more than one related record of the same type. (*see example below)-{color}
* {color:#0747a6}-Service Account(s) can be removed, but a related record MUST have at least one linked Service Account-{color}{color:#0747a6} {color}

{color:#0747a6}-And Navigation options are:-{color}

* {color:#0747a6}-Cancel-{color}
** {color:#0747a6}-No updates saved-{color}
** {color:#0747a6}-Back/Previous-{color}
*** {color:#0747a6}-User is returned to initial edit fields step with inputs retained.-{color}
** {color:#0747a6}-Save/Finish-{color}
*** {color:#0747a6}-System shall save the updates-{color}

{color:#0747a6}AC10: Delete Configuration{color}
{color:#0747a6}Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#0747a6}When I select a {color}{color:#0747a6}*Client Contract*{color}{color:#0747a6} record {color}
{color:#0747a6}And {color}{color:#0747a6}*Status = “Draft”*{color}
{color:#0747a6}And I am on the “Configurations” tab{color}
{color:#0747a6}Then I have the ability to “Delete Configuration” on a specific record{color}
{color:#0747a6}And if I select “Delete Configuration”, the system shall confirm that I want to delete.{color}

* {color:#0747a6}Message: Do you want to delete this record?{color}

{color:#0747a6}And navigation options are:{color}

* {color:#0747a6}Cancel {color}{color:#0747a6}_(Design: To cancel, user click on “X” in upper right of the modal)_{color}
** {color:#0747a6}No records are deleted{color}
* {color:#0747a6}Delete{color}
** {color:#0747a6}Configuration record is deleted{color}

----

# Within each section we will display high level information about each record
# On each record we will have an option to “View”
# When viewing a record, you will have an option to “Edit” or “Delete Configuration”

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3862, PR1050558-3886, PR1050558-3966 Action Plan Template for SUN Tasks (built in separate [user story|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-886])

Create the action Buttons in PMT Phase

# ‘SUN - Preliminary’
# ‘SUN - Revision’
# ‘SUN - Final’

Upon clicking the button check if the Service Account (inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c)

* is blank “Error as per AC”
* if Service Account is available then check if
** Already a case for that PMT is available for that type then do not create a new case else create a new case based on button selected as per AC
* Check if there are open Task for Action Plan for the Case
** when exist Close the all the Task
* Create a new Action Plan as per AC
* Rest the Case Status = Not Started

Case Team Member is copied from the Account Team Role


Flow to associate respective Action Plan Template at ‘SUN Status’ change and set the new status
-Custom field on Client onboarding CASE - “SUN Status“ - picklist: Not Started, Ready, In Progress, Completed- 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Create PMT Case for SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Update’, or ‘SUN - Complete’
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a PMT project exists
Then from the *PMT Phase* I have the ability to create a *PMT Case* for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ (3 actions/buttons)
And system shall check if “Service Account” field is populated on PMT Phase:

* If yes, then proceed
* If no, user can not proceed
** Display error: ‘Service Account’ field must be populated to proceed
** Available navigation actions:
*** Cancel
**** Guided experience is closed
**** User is returned to the PMT Phase
**** No case or tasks are created

And if Service Account is populated, then the system shall display:

* Message: By clicking Finish the system shall automatically create new tasks & send the <Dynamically populate based on selection: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ > email. If there are any open tasks, they will be automatically closed and new tasks shall be created.

And available navigation options:

* Cancel
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the PMT Phase
** No case or tasks are created
* Finish
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the PMT Phase

And upon clicking Finish:

* If the *PMT Case* for the selected Type *does Not exist* then:
** -New PMT Case is created- [Split/covered under story [+PR1050558-905+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-905]]
*** -Case Record Type = ‘Client Onboarding’ (-*-NEW-*-)-
*** -Subject = <Type> for <Account Name (Service Account)>-
*** -Case Owner = <user who initiated the case>-
*** -Type = <based on button selected: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ >-
*** -Status = 'Not Started'- (NOTE: Case and task creation will be in a single flow, so you will not see “Not Started”, it will get to set to “In Progress” per AC 2)
*** -Case Origin = ‘Manual’-
*** -Priority = ‘Medium’-
*** -PMT Phase = <PMT Phase>-
*** -Account Name = <'Service Account' from PMT Phase>-
** Tasks are created based on story [+PR1050558-886+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-886]
* If the *PMT Case* for the selected Type *does exist* then:
** NO new PMT Case is created
** Existing Tasks in Status = 'Open' are automatically updated to Status = ‘Canceled’
** New Tasks are automatically created based on story [+PR1050558-886+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-886]
* And send the SUN Email notification [Covered under story [+PR1050558-887+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-887]+]+

AC2: Auto Update the PMT Case Status
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a *PMT Case* for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ has been created for a PMT Phase
Then the system shall automatically update the PMT Case Status:

* Update ‘Status’ = ‘In Progress’, when there are open related tasks (Status = ‘Open’)
* Update ‘Status’ = ‘Closed’, once ALL related tasks are updated to closed (Status = ‘Complete' or ‘Canceled’)

AC3: Ability to view Tasks from the PMT Case
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When I navigate to a *PMT Case* for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’
Then I have the ability to view the related tasks


Design Note: in order to set the task ‘Assigned To’ based on Team Role, we need to automatically create ‘Case Team' based on the related Account Team. On the Client Onboarding case, we had to add the 'Case Team’ tab. And successfully created a *Letter of Intent* contract record (system creates upon completion of the guided experience) [[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1676|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1676|smart-link] & [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3463|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3463|smart-link] ]
Then the system shall create an email:

* An email is sent to:
** DL(PROD): <[+DL.ClientContracting@schumachergroup.onmicrosoft.com+|mailto:DL.ClientContracting@schumachergroup.onmicrosoft.com]>
* Email Subject: New Letter of Intent Request for <Opportunity Name>
* Email Body:
** Hi,

A Letter of Intent request has been created for the following Opportunity: <Display “Opportunity Name”. when the user clicks the opportunity name it will link them back to Opportunity Record>

The following Contract has been created: <Contract Number, link to the letter of intent contract record>

Thank you,

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3867, PR1050558-3891, PR1050558-3975 Flow Action: Amend Contract

UI Inout Element

* Contract.Name → Contract Name: Field Field
* Contract.Description → - Populate with ‘Description’ captured in guided experience

Default setup

* PreviousContractId = CURRENT.Contract.Id
* Contract.Status = 'Draft'
* Key Dates - All fields within this section should be Blank
** Requested Date
** Date Sent For Internal Review
** Other Party Sent Date
** Other Party Returned Date
** Executed Copy Mailed Out Date
** Activated Date
** Activated By
** Date Distributed



Need ability to see original files (all files related to the amended contract - contract that was cloned from)

* Use the ContentDocument and ContentDocumentLink to relate the field 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Ability to ‘Amend Contract'
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When navigate to a Contract (RT: Letter of Intent) record
Then I have the ability to select the ‘Amend Contract’ guided experience
And the user is *required* to input:

* Contract Name
* Description

And available navigation options:

* Cancel (cancel is via the “X” in upper right)
** No records are created or updated
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the Letter of Intent Contract
* Finish/Save
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the NEW Letter of Intent Contract (Design: user is presented with a link to view new contract)
** System clones the Contract
*** Clone everything EXCEPT:
**** Contract Name - Populate with ‘Contract Name’ captured in guided experience
**** Description - Populate with ‘Description’ captured in guided experience
**** Key Dates - All fields within this section should be Blank
**** Status - set to 'Draft'
** Need ability to see original files (all files related to the amended contract - contract that was cloned from)

----

Add the Related List for Service for the Contract (based on Service__c.Letter_of_Intent__c) 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: View *Letter of Intent* Contract
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I select a Letter of Intent contract record (Contract tab list view = “Open Client Contract Requests” [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1736|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1736|smart-link] or from the Opportunity’s Contract related list [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2166|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2166|smart-link] )
Then on the Details tab, I shall have the ability to *view* the information the captured via the guided experience and additional fields needed by the Legal Team.
(Guided Experience stories: [+1676 - Client Contracting - “LOI Request”+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1676] +&+ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3463|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3463|smart-link] )

And *view* the following fields in the Contract Overview section:

* Contract Owner
* Contract Number
* Contract Name (*newly added* for action = Amend Request)
* Description (*newly added* for action = Amend Request)
* Status (NOTE: will be visible in the Highlight panel (top of the record)
* Account Name
* Contract Start Date
* Contract End Date
* Source Opportunity

And *view* the following existing fields in the Letter of Intent Request Info (left column) need to be updated:

* Name of Client Representative
** Help Text: Name of Client Representative LOI will be addressed to
* Client Address
* Name of Client Entity
* Name of each Hospital - *Remove/Delete*
* Location of each Hospital (City & State)
* Type of Services at each Hospital - *Renamed to* “Service Line”
** Help Text: Type of Services to be provided at each Hospital (EM/HM/ICU/Connected Care)
* Description of Services - *Remove/Delete*
* Anticipated Start Date for Services
* Proposed Term of Agreement
** Help Text: i.e. 3 years
* Financial Terms
** Help Text: i.e. MG, subsidy, at risk money/incentive money, etc.
* Other Key Terms & Assumptions
** Help Text: i.e. MOR/Governance/GME program, Malpractice limits, etc.

And *view* the following new fields to the Letter of Intent Request Info section (right column):

* Agreement Start Date 
* Perpetual
* Contract Term (Months)
* Agreement End Date
* Amendment Effective Date

And *view* the following fields in the *Key Dates section* (see data dictionary for layout):

* Requested Date
* Date Sent For Internal Review
* Other Party Sent Date
* Other Party Returned Date
* Outstanding Days
* Executed Copy Mailed Out Date
* Activated Date
* Activated By
* Date Distributed
* Total Process Days

{color:#bf2600}-And view tab = Related, containing ‘Services’ related list-{color}{color:#bf2600}*(NOTE: COVERED UNDER NEW STORY*{color}{color:#bf2600} {color}[+PR1050558-4107+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4107]{color:#bf2600}*)*{color}

* {color:#bf2600}-Filtered by: Services Status = Active-{color}{color:#bf2600} {color}
* {color:#bf2600}-Fields to display: Service Account (name) & Service Line-{color}

AC2: Edit *Letter of Intent* Contract
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I select a Letter of Intent contract record
And Status = Draft
Then on the Details tab, I have the ability to edit fields within the Contract Overview section; EXCEPT for:

* Status (NOTE: visible in the Highlights Panel only)
* Source Opportunity

And in the *Letter of Intent Request Info section*, the user shall have the ability to *edit fields only in Status = Draft*:

Left column:

* Name of Client Representative [text, 255]
* Client Address [text area, 255]
* Name of Client Entity [text, 255]
* Location of each Hospital (City & State) [text area (long), 131,072]
* Service Line [text, 255]
* Anticipated Start Date for Services [date]
* Proposed Term of Agreement [text, 255]
* Financial Terms [-text, 255- *text area (long), 131072*]
* Other Key Terms & Assumptions [-text, 255- *text area (long), 131072*]

And in the *Letter of Intent Request Info section*, the user shall have the ability to *edit until Status = Executed* (Edit in status: Draft & Submitted. Read only for all other statuses)

Right column:

* Agreement Start Date [date]
* Perpetual [Checkbox]
* Contract Term (Months) [number 3,0]
* Agreement End Date [date]
* Amendment Effective Date [date]

And in *Key Dates section,* the user shall have the ability to *edit fields at ANY Status*:

Left column:

* Requested Date [date]
* Date Sent For Internal Review [date]
* Other Party Sent Date [date]
* Other Party Returned Date [date]
* Outstanding Days [READ ONLY, formula]

Right column:

* Executed Copy Mailed Out Date [date]
* Activated Date [date/time] - *READ ONLY*
* Activated By [lookup to user] - *READ ONLY*
* Date Distributed [date]
* Total Process Days [READ ONLY, formula] 		08/Dec/25 9:38 AM   6 08/Oct/25 6:08 PM SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT), SCP Sprint 12 10/Oct/25 2:34 PM 1|i0fkaf: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM As a Legal team member, I need a view of contract requests that need to be written, so that I can see a clear view of what work I need to complete 11/Nov/25

AC1: Guided experience for Letter of Intent
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support Apps
When:

* Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity)
** Pro Forma Status = ‘Model Confirmed’ or ‘Approved for Contracting’

Then from the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth), the Sales VP has the ability to select the guided experience = “*Initiate Contracting Request*”

And user will be presented the option to select Contract Type Request = Letter of Intent

And the user will be presented with the following required fields:

* Section Header: Letter of Intent Fields
** Name of Client Representative LOI will be addressed to [text, 255]
** Client Address [text area, 255]

21/Nov/25 10:19 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Client 360 Accepted   Low ClientMaintenance, ClinicianImpact, TADesignComplete Jasmine Moradi   PR1050558-3390, PR1050558-1682, PR1050558-3847, PR1050558-5173, PR1050558-3594, PR1050558-3389, PR1050558-3391, PR1050558-3565, PR1050558-3574, PR1050558-6148, PR1050558-3478 Srishty Sharma Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-3388

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3486, PR1050558-3504 Created by Gemini

h3. ## Part 1: Analyze Contract Changes



This first part kicks off automatically when a contract's status is set to "Executed." Its job is to analyze all the detailed changes in the contract and sort them into organized groups.

# *Gather Data:* It starts by collecting every single payment agreement change associated with that contract. It also makes a special note of any "mixed bag" facilities where pay rates for the same shift are inconsistent, as these require manual review.
# *Classify Changes:* It then looks at each change one-by-one and applies a set of rules to categorize it. Each change is tagged with a reason (e.g., "Stipend Change," "Rate Decreased") and assigned a process type based on a strict hierarchy:
#* *Manual:* For complex or high-risk changes.
#* *Agent:* For simple, routine changes that still need a person to review them.
#* *Automation:* For very straightforward changes that the system can handle on its own.
# *Create Summaries:* Instead of dealing with hundreds of small changes, it creates a handful of summary records. Each summary record represents one facility and contains the final process type (Manual, Agent, or Automation) and a list of all the reasons for the change.
# *Launch Part 2:* Once it's finished, it automatically triggers the second part of the process, handing off the contract ID.



h3. ## Part 2: Create Actionable Records



This second job takes the organized summaries from Part 1 and creates the final records that people will work with.

# *Get Summaries and People:* It fetches the summary records created in Part 1. Then, it finds every active healthcare professional who works at the affected facilities under that contract.
# *Create Final Records:* For each of those healthcare professionals, it creates a new "Client Change Management" record. This record links the professional to the contract and assigns the appropriate *Process Type* (Manual, Agent, or Automation) that was determined in Part 1.

Essentially, the entire process takes a complex and messy set of contract changes and turns them into a clean, organized list of tasks, each assigned to the correct processing channel.

----

Step 1: When Practice Operation Contract Status = Executed *(Execute only when PreviousContractId is not null)*

Create an Asynchronous Queued Apex Job (This is not a batch job)

# Pick all PreventiveCareAgreement record for the Contract Sort by FacilityTitle__c DESC
## SELECT FacilityTitle__c, Existing_Rate_Increased__c, Existing_Rate_Decreased__c, New_Shift_Type_Added__c, New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c, Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c, Is_Newly_Added__c, Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c, Rate_Pay_Code_Remove__c, Over_Rate__c, Is_Deleted__c FROM PreventiveCareAgreement WHERE ContractPaymentAgreement.ContractId = '8007x00000fu90zAAA' Order BY FacilityTitle__c
# Find the Mixed Bag Shift Rates Set<ID> [Facility_Title_Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates]
## SELECT FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c, MAX(Rate__c), MIN(Rate__c) FROM PreventiveCareAgreement WHERE Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code != “Shift Bonus”
GROUP BY FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c
## Create a Set<Id> → Id:FacilityTitle__c -> Facility Title that has Mixed Bag Rates
## Loop Through the Query when MAX(Rate__c) != MIN(Rate__c) then add to the Set<Id>
# Create a Map<Id,Set<String>> [Facility_Title_Change_Type] → Id:FacilityTitle__c, String: Rules String(s)
# Create a Map<String,Set<Id>> [Facility_Title_Process_Type] → String: Store Process Type (Manual, Agent, Automation), Id: FacilityTitle__c
# Loop through all PreventiveCareAgreement records the Map (For Each Record add the related change with a nested if else)
## *Rule 1 Stipend Change:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Stipend AND (Existing_Rate_Increased__c = true OR Existing_Rate_Decreased__c = true OR Is_Newly_Added__c = true)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “Stipend Change” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add the String = “Manual” into the [Facility_Title_Process_Type] with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 2 Leadership Incentives Change:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Leadership Incentives” AND (Existing_Rate_Increased__c = true OR Existing_Rate_Decreased__c = true OR Is_Newly_Added__c = true)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “Leadership Incentives Change” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add Facility Title Id to the String = “Manual” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 3 Variable Change:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Variable” AND (Existing_Rate_Increased__c = true OR Existing_Rate_Decreased__c = true OR Is_Newly_Added__c = true)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “Variable Change” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add Facility Title Id to the String = “Manual” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 4 Shift Bonus Change:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND (New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c = true OR (Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code = “Shift Bonus” AND ( Existing_Rate_Decreased__c = true OR Existing_Rate_Decreased__c = true))
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “Shift Bonus Change” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add Facility Title Id to the String = “Manual” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 5 Mixed Bag Shift Rates:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND When Facility Id is found in Step 2 “Find the Mixed Bag Shift Rates“ [Facility_Title_Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates] )
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “Shift Mixed Bag Shift Rates” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add Facility Title Id to the String = “Manual” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 6 New Shift Type Added:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND New_Shift_Type_Added__c = true )
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “New Shift Type Added” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add Facility Title Id to the String = “Manual” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 7 NPPA Tier Change:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Contract.NPPA_Tier_Changed__c = true AND PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND PreventiveCareAgreement.-Shift_r-Facility_Title_r.CodeSetSubType = “Employee” AND PreventiveCareAgreement.Facility_Title_r.Shift_Type__c = “NP/PA”)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “ NPPA Tier Change” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add Facility Title Id to the String = “Manual” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 8 Rate Decreased for Existing Shift:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND Existing_Rate_Decreased__c = true)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “ Rate Decreased for Existing Shift” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### Add Facility Title Id to String = “Manual” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
#### Remove the Facility Title Id if its added for other String = “Agent” or “Automation” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 9 ONLY Rate Increased Existing Shift:* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND Existing_Rate_Increased__c = true AND New_Shift_Type_Added__c = false AND New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c = false AND Is_Newly_Added__c = false)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “ ONLY Rate Increased Existing Shift” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### IF Check the Facility Title Id is added part of “Manual” list if so do nothing
#### ELSE Check the Facility Title Id is added part of “Automation” list if so Remove the Facility Title Id
#### ELSE Add Facility Title Id to String = “Agent” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 10 New Shift Added with existing Type and same Rate :* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND New_Shift_Type_Added__c = false AND Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c = true AND Is_Newly_Added__c = true)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “ New Shift Added with existing Type and same Rate” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### IF Check the Facility Title Id is added part of “Manual” list if so do nothing
#### ELSE Check the Facility Title Id is added part of “Agent” list if so do nothing
#### ELSE Add Facility Title Id to String = “Automation” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
## *Rule 11* R*ate Pay Code Change :* if(PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” AND Rate_Pay_Code_Remove__c > 0 AND Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c > 0 AND Is_Newly_Added__c = true)
### [Facility_Title_Change_Type]
#### Add the “Facility Title Id” into the [Facility_Title_Change_Type] with String = “Rate Pay Code Change” (Map<Id,Set<String>>)
### [Facility_Title_Process_Type]
#### IF Check the Facility Title Id is added part of “Manual” list if so do nothing
#### ELSE Check the Facility Title Id is added part of “Agent” list if so do nothing
#### ELSE Add Facility Title Id to String = “Automation” into the Map with Id = “Facility Title Id” (Map<String,Set<Id>>)
# After Completion of the Loop
## Create *Practice Operation Change* records
### Loop Through [Facility_Title_Process_Type].String
#### Loop Through [Facility_Title_Process_Type].Set<Id>
##### Contract__c = Current Contract ID
##### Facility_Title__c = [Facility_Title_Process_Type].Set<Id>
##### Process_Type__c = [Facility_Title_Process_Type].String
##### Qualified_Rules__c = [Facility_Title_Change_Type].<Id>.get<Set>[String] - Convert into comma (,) separated string
### Insert *Practice Operation Change* Records



Step 2: When *Practice Operation Change* are created launch another Asynchronous Queued job (with the Id for the Contract)

# Query all *Practice Operation Change* Records and create a MAP <Id, String> [Facility Title, Process Type]
# Query all HPF Status ≠ 'Inactive' and HPF.AccountId = Contract.AccountId AND HPF.Facility_Title_Id in [Step 1.Facility Title]
# Loop through Query 2
## Create *Client Change Management* records
### Contract = Contract Id
### Healthcare Practitioner Facility = HPF.Id from 2
### Process Type = [Step 1.Process Type]
### Status = New
### *Practice Operation Change* = *Practice Operation* [*Change*|http://Change.Id][.Id|http://Change.Id]
## Insert *Client Change Management* records 		0 Kristin Koide 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Pre-Req = Story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3391|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3391|smart-link]

AC1: Create *Practice Operation Change* & *Client Change Management* records
Given I am a System Administrator
When a Practice Operations contract’s Status = ‘Executed'
Then the system shall create *one* *Practice Operation Change* record *per Facility Title* referenced in the Contract:

* Contract = <Practice Operations contract>
* Facility Title = <Facility Title>
* Process Type = <Manual, Agent, or Automation based on logic below>
* Qualified Rules = <list of rules that were executed separated by commas (,)>

And the system shall *find all the related Healthcare Practitioner Facility* where:

* HPF Status ≠ 'Inactive'
* HPF ‘Account' = Practice Operation’s 'Account Name'

And the system shall create *one* *Client Change Management* record *per Healthcare Practitioner Facility* based on matching the HPF’s ‘Facility Title’ to a Practice Operation Change ‘Facility Title’:

* Contract = <Practice Operations contract>
* Healthcare Practitioner Facility = <Healthcare Practitioner Facility>
* Process Type = <Manual, Agent, or Automation based on the matching Practice Operation Change ‘Process Type’>
* Status = ‘New’
* Practice Operation Change = <matching Practice Operation Change record>




*Process Type: Order of Execution, Rules and Logic to set Process Type* ([link|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/19DsMwfjs0JSxk6DUu0KoafnznoQSOS83XHbvXCKMEA4/edit?usp=sharing] to supporting document)

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-3429, PR1050558-3515 Scheduled Flow on Contract

Look for Clinician RT: Clinician, Employee_Type__c = “Independent Contractor” and Contract.EndDate = Today() and Clinician*.*Account.Professional_Title__pc = _NP or PA_


For Each Contract that is expiring today

Step 1: Get all HPF Records that is part of the expiring Clinician Contract
Step 2: See if any of the HPF Records has Contract extend

# Query ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Contract.StartDate > Today() and Status = “Executed” and ProviderNetworkContract.Employee_Type__c = “Independent Contractor” AND ContractorProviderNetworkContract.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c in HPF In from Step 1
# If Query return no records
## Update the expiring Contract Status: if no records are found in Step 2.1 then [Expiring]ContractStatus = Canceled and [Expiring]Cancel_Reason__c = Terminated
## Creating Cases when Terminating Employee:
### Create a Case RT: Clinician Offboarding, Type: Facility cases & tasks for the each HPF
#### -All Child Cases with ‘Status’ = Closed, ‘Closed Reason’ = Complete-
#### All Tasks with ‘Status’ = Canceled
### {color:#ff5630}Check if Clinician has any other active HPF (that is not expiring) Select Id from HealthcarePractitionerFacility WHERE PractitionerId = Clinician{color}{color:#ff5630}*.*{color}{color:#ff5630}AccountId and Id not in (HPFId in Step 1) AND Status != “Inactice”{color}
#### {color:#ff5630}if No record returned{color}
##### {color:#ff5630}Create a Case RT: Clinician Offboarding, Type: SCP cases & tasks {color}
##### {color:#ff5630}All Tasks with ‘Status’ = Canceled{color}
#### {color:#ff5630}else do nothing{color}
## Update the Each HPF in Step 1
### Status = Inactive
### Effective To = date the automation ran
### Termination Date = date the automation ran
# If Query return records the check if any of the HPF Id in Step 1 is not part of the extended Contract and get those HPFIds
## Update the expiring Contract Status: if records are found in Step 2.2 then [Expiring]ContractStatus = Canceled and [Expiring]Cancel_Reason__c = Superseded
## Create a Case RT: Clinician Offboarding, Type: Facility cases & tasks for the each HPF
### -All Child Cases with ‘Status’ = Closed, ‘Closed Reason’ = Complete-
### All Tasks with ‘Status’ = Canceled
## Update the Each HPF in Step 3
### Status = Inactive
### Effective To = date the automation ran
### Termination Date = date the automation ran 		0 Jasmine Moradi 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician Contracting Specialist in the corporate support apps
When I navigate to a clinician contract record where:

* Employment Type = Independent Contractor
* Contract is associated with HPF records where Facility Title = Nurse Practitioner and/or Physician Assistant

Then when a year has passed from the Contract Start Date ({color:#403294}Contract End Date = today’s date{color}) AND no new clinician contracts {color:#403294}in Status = Executed AND Employment Type = Independent Contractor {color}have been created

-Then look for Contract records that meet the following criteria:-

* -Employment Type = Independent Contractor-
* -Start Date is after the Start Date of the original contract (where a year has passed)-

Then the {color:#403294}IC{color} Contract record is automatically updated with the following:

* Contract record updates
** Status = Canceled
** Cancel Reason = Terminated

{color:#403294}And the system shall automatically create the Clinician Offboarding {color}{color:#403294}*Facility*{color}{color:#403294} cases & tasks for the Facility on the IC contract (populate Clinician, Service Account, and HPF lookups){color}

{color:#403294}And system shall automatically create the Clinician Offboarding {color}{color:#403294}*SCP*{color}{color:#403294} cases & tasks if the Clinician has no other Active HPFs (Status ≠ Inactive){color}

{color:#403294}And the system shall automatically close Facility and SCP (if applicable):{color}

* {color:#403294}Tasks with ‘Status’ = Canceled{color}
* {color:#403294}Cases with ‘Status’ = Closed, ‘Closed Reason’ = Complete{color}

{color:#403294}And the system shall automatically update the following:{color}

* HPF record updates {color:#403294}shall only be for the applicable IC NPPA HPF record(s){color}
** Status = Inactive
** Effective To = date the automation ran

AC3: HC Portal: Administration > Emails > Sender
Given I am a System Administrator for the HC Portal (Experience Cloud)
When emails are sent out from the HC Portal
Then the *Sender information* shall be set to:

* From Name = ‘Core Connect’
* Email Address (must be verified) = 'no-reply-sf@scphealth.com'

AC4: HC Portal: Administration > Preferences > Record Ownership
Given I am a System Administrator for the HC Portal (Experience Cloud)
When guest users create a new record within the portal
Then the ‘Default Owner' shall be set to *<System Integration User>*

AC5: Update ‘siteAdmin’ (Technical AC)
Given I am a System Administrator for the HC Portal (Experience Cloud)
When I am viewing the repository
Then I want the ‘siteAdmin’ to reflect James Brou’s email id and username.

!image-20251024-202020.png|width=815,alt="image-20251024-202020.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC: Ability to ‘Activate Contract'
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When navigate to a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
And Contract Type = Master
Then I have the ability to select the ‘Activate Contract’ guided experience
{color:#403294}And system shall check that field = ‘SCP Corporate Entity’ is populated on ALL related Provider Network Contract (PNC) records{color}

* {color:#403294}If yes, then allow user to click 'Finish”{color}
* {color:#403294}If no, then display the below message and NOT allow the user to ‘Finish’{color}
** {color:#403294}Message:{color} {color:#403294}‘SCP Corporate Entity’ field must populated on all related Provider Network Contract(s) to activate this contract.{color}

And available navigation options:

* Cancel (cancel is via the “X” in upper right)
** No updates are made
** Guided Experience is closed
** User is returned to the Client Contract
* Finish/Save
** Guided Experience is closed
** User is returned to the Client Contract
** And the system shall make the following updates:
*** Populate “Activated Date” with current/today’s date
*** Populate “Activated By” with the user who initiated ‘Activate Contract’
*** Updates “Status” = “Executed”
** And the system shall locate the *previous contract in status = Executed* (only if it was “Amended” - Previous Contract populated) and make the following update:
*** Update “Status” = “Superseded”

Notes:

|ACTIONS (guided process)|no condition on displaying actions| |
|Activate|Used to update status to Executed. populates Activated by, date & user who “Activated”|System shall also update the original/Previous contract status = “Superseded”| 		08/Dec/25 9:38 AM   6 image-20251024-202020.png 30/Sep/25 8:48 PM SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT), SCP Sprint 12 23/Oct/25 3:45 PM 1|i0f8vr: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a Legal team member, when I am on a Client Contract, I want the ability to Activate, so that I can indicate that a contract status should be Executed and populate Activated by, Activated Date & user who Activated. 11/Nov/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3348, PR1050558-3349, PR1050558-3350 *AC1 & 2:*

*Name:* Client Contract Scheduled Flow

Use Scheduled Flow in Contract Object and Filter Conditions for RT: Client Contract AND Contract_Type__c = “Terms & Renewals” AND (Internal Renewal Start Date = Today() OR Renewal Notice Date = Today())

For Each Record that Qualifies Criteria

When Internal Renewal Start Date = Today()

* Query Contract_Provider_Network_Relation__c.Contract__c = CURRENT[.Contract.Id|http://Current.Contract.Id] For each records create Task record(s)
** Record Type: Default
** Subject: Provider_Network_Contract__r.Service_Account__r.Name + Upcoming Contract Expiration
** Related To: Client Contract
** Assigned To: Client Contracting Queue
** Due Date: Create date + 14 days
** Priority: Normal



When Renewal Notice Date = Today()

* Query Contract_Provider_Network_Relation__c.Contract__c = CURRENT[.Contract.Id|http://Current.Contract.Id] For each records create Task record(s)
** Record Type: Default
** Subject: Provider_Network_Contract__r.Service_Account__r.Name + Upcoming Contract Expiration REMINDER
** Related To: Client Contract
** Assigned to: Client Contracting Queue
** Due Date: Create date + 7 days
** Priority: High



AC3:

New Button in Contract RT: Client Contract AND Contract_Type__c = “Master” (as part of this story create the Ultiamte_Parent_Id__c field)

On Button Click

Query Contract.Ultiamte_Parent_Id__c = CURRENT.Contract.Ultiamte_Parent_Id__c

Update all returned records Contract.Status = Expired



!image-20251024-195547.png|width=927,alt="image-20251024-195547.png"!





{color:#bf2600}*NOTE: the picture store ParentContractId but we should be using Previous Contract Id (formula field not working so use the flow to build the Ultimate Parent Id)*{color}

Record Triggered Flow for updating Contract.Ultimate_Parent_Id__c

When Contract Records is created (no need to check for record type as it can be used for all type of Contract)

Before Save: Fast Field Update

When PreviousContract.Id = ““ then Contract.Ultimate_Parent_Id__c = [Contract.Id|http://Contract.Id]

When PreviousContract.Id != ““ then Contract.Ultimate_Parent_Id__c = PreviousContract[.|http://Contract.Id]Ultimate_Parent_Id__c

!image-20251024-202020.png|width=815,alt="image-20251024-202020.png"!

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto task reminders - Upcoming Contract Expiration

Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When a Client Contract has a “Term & Renewals” record where the “*Internal Renewal Start Date*” is equal to the current date/today’s date
Then the system shall *create one task per related Service Account* on the date listed in field = “Internal Renewal Start Date”: (note: the PNC record is the relation between the Client Contract and the specific Service Account)

* Record Type: Default
* Subject: <Service Account> Upcoming Contract Expiration
* Related To: Client Contract
* Assigned To: Client Contracting Queue
* Due Date: Create date + 14 days
* Priority: Normal

AC2: Auto task reminders - Upcoming Contract Expiration REMINDER

Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When a Client Contract has a “Term & Renewals” record where the “*Renewal Notice Date*” is equal to the current date/today’s date
Then the system shall *create one task per related Service Account* on the date listed in field = “Internal Renewal Start Date”: (note: the PNC record is the relation between the Client Contract and the specific Service Account)

* Record Type: Default
* Subject: <Service Account> Upcoming Contract Expiration REMINDER
* Related To: Client Contract
* Assigned to: Client Contracting Queue
* Due Date: Create date + 7 days
* Priority: High

AC3: Ability to ‘Expire Contract'
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When navigate to a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
And Contract Type = Master
Then I have the ability to select the ‘Expire Contract’ guided experience
And available navigation options:

* Cancel (cancel is via the “X” in upper right)
** No tasks are initiated
** Guided Experience is closed
** User is returned to the Client Contract
* Finish/Save
** Guided Experience is closed
** User is returned to the Client Contract
** System shall update *current* & *All* Previous Contract Status = “Expired”

Notes:

|ACTIONS (guided process)|no condition on displaying actions| |
|Expire|Used when we are expiring a Contract and a NEW agreement is created
Current Status = Expire, still an active customer, but with a new Contract. - currently just updates the Status = Expire. different process for creating a “New”.
\\
*Service Account is Active, but Term & Renewal field = 'Agreement End Date' is populated and that date is met.*|{color:#bf2600}*PNC - New “Status' field that has the same value as the Contract status*{color}
*New Contract Status = “Expired”. - part of story* [+PR1050558-2807+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2807]+/ split to+ [+PR1050558-3347+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3347]
\\
System to generate a task or auto update status (Phase 2 [+PR1050558-3355+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3355])
task 1 per Service Account - generate on date in field = “Internal Renewal Start Date”
Subject= <Service Account> Upcoming Contract Expiration
Related To: Client Contract
Assigned to: client contracting queue
Due Date: Create date + 14 days
Task 2 per Service Account - generate on date in field “Renewal Notice Date”
Subject= <Service Account> Upcoming Contract Expiration REMINDER
Related To: Client Contract
Assigned to: client contracting queue
Due Date: Create date + 7
Priority: High| 		08/Dec/25 9:38 AM   6 image-20251024-195547.png 30/Sep/25 8:47 PM SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT), SCP Sprint 12 29/Oct/25 9:42 AM 1|i0f8uv: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a Legal team member, when I am on a Client Contract, I want the ability to Expire, so that I can indicate that a contract is expiring and a NEW agreement/contract is created. (not amending, the contract has ended. A brand new contract is being created or has to be created) 06/Nov/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3344, PR1050558-3345, PR1050558-3346 Create a Action in for Contract RT: Client Contract

Use a Screen Flow:

Get User Input

* Contract Name
* Description



Use a Auto Launched Flow for Clone Contract Creation

Clone the entire Contract

# Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master”
## Contract Name - Populate with ‘Contract Name’ captured in guided experience
## Description - Populate with ‘Description’ captured in guided experience
## Key Dates - All fields within this section should be Blank
## Status - set to 'Draft'
## -Contract.StartDate =-
# Any Child Contract records ParentContractId = Id from Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master”
# Any PNC Records for each Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master”
# Any Contract Provider Network Relation for each child Contract.Contract_Type__c != “Master”



* Need ability to see original files (all files related to the amended contract - contract that was cloned from)

Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When navigate to a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
And Contract Type = Master
Then I have the ability to select the ‘Amend Contract’ guided experience
And the user is *required* to input:

* Contract Name
* Description

And available navigation options:

* Cancel (cancel is via the “X” in upper right)
** No records are created or updated
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the Client Contract
* Finish/Save
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the NEW Client Contract
** System clones the Contract and all related Service Accounts [using PNC] (even if Term & Renewal field *“Agreement End Date”* is populated and in the past) and related records
*** Clone everything EXCEPT:
**** Contract Name - Populate with ‘Contract Name’ captured in guided experience
**** Description - Populate with ‘Description’ captured in guided experience
**** Key Dates - All fields within this section should be Blank
**** Status - set to 'Draft'
** Need ability to see original files (all files related to the amended contract - contract that was cloned from)

----

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3874, PR1050558-3898, PR1050558-3965 AC1 Solution: (build on top of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1679|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1679|smart-link] )

# Update the Flow: “PMT Task After Save Flow” to send the PMT Phase → Service Account → Service Line as input parameter to Sub Flow (PMT Task : Action Plan and Record Updation Flow)
## inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Phase__r.Service_Account__r.Service_Line__r.Name
# Update the Flow: “PMT Task : Action Plan and Record Updation Flow”
## In Section where Activity records within an Action Plan is looped
### Check if Feting_the_activity_date.Applies_to_Service_Line__c != NULL
#### If Not Null -> check PMT Phase:Service Account:Service Line (available as input for flow) in Feting_the_activity_date.Applies_to_Service_Line__c
#### If Service Account:Service Line is different then *DELETE* the Task
# The existing flow uses a count Transform_1 for count and that logic need to be revisited as we are deleting the Task (recommend to count the no of task within the loop itself any how you are looping)

*if the Service Line is BLANK then do not apply the logic as its common for all Service Line*

!image-20251021-181058.png|width=927,alt="image-20251021-181058.png"!



AC2 Solution: OOTB Feature 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Option 2 - Delete tasks based on Service Line
Given I am an Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When I updated the PMT Task Status is set to “In Progress”
And tasks have been automatically created via the Action Plan Template
And a within a Task’s ‘Applies to Service Line’ text field it contains different service lines separated by commas “<service line>,<service line>_”_
Then I want the system will determine if the Service Account’s Service Line value, matches the Service Line(s) listed in the ‘Applies to Service Line’:

* If the system determines that it *does NOT* match, then the system shall delete the task
* If the system determines that it *does* match, then the system shall NOT delete the task
* If 'Applies to Service Line’ field is blank, then do NOT delete.

Example of verbiage in ‘Applies to Service Line’ = CC,CM,CCC

(NOTE: if the Service Account’s Service Line is not populated, then the system will not delete any tasks)

AC2: Ability for the Implementation Specialist persona to create, clone & publish Action Plan Templates
Given I am an Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When an existing task requires a change or a new task needs to be added
Then I shall access to the following actions:

* Clone Template
* Publish Template
* Deactivate Template ( Action Plan Templates(Old) when new Action Plan Templates is crated)

And when the Action Plan Template is in Status = Draft, then on the Items tab for Tasks I have the ability to:

* Add “New Task”
* Edit
* Delete

----

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3496, PR1050558-3514, PR1050558-3317 Update the record triggered flow [Task After Flow|https://corehc--dev1.sandbox.my.salesforce-setup.com/builder_platform_interaction/flowBuilder.app?flowId=3017x00001NS9PHAA1]

# When the Task.Status is updated to Completed or Canceled or Open check if the Task is part of Action Plan by running a query on ActionPlanItem.ActionPlanId = <TaskId> AND ItemEntityType = Task
# If this is part of an Action Plan (if Step 1 return a Query)
## ActionPlanItem.ActionPlanId is the Action Plan Id
## Look if the Status of the Action Plan is “In Progress”
## if not update the Action Plan status = “In Progress”
# Get the number of Task Closed and Open for the Action Plan
## Get All ActionPlanItem.ItemId records for that ActionPlanItem.ActionPlanId
## Query Task based on All ActionPlanItem.ItemId
## Count No of Task that are “Open”, “Completed” (Note: We are ignoring any cancelled task if any)
## Sum “Open” + “Completed” to calculate Total Tasks
# Look if the Action Plan Id is stored as part of PMT Task (inov8__PMT_Task__c.Related_Action_Plan__c) if found a match then update with below details
## inov8__PMT_Task__c.Total_Tasks__c = step 3.d
## inov8__PMT_Task__c.No_of_Completed_Tasks__c = step 3.c ( count “Completed”)
## inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Percentage_Completion__c = count “Completed” / step 3.d “Total”



Check OOTB Flow Template as reference *Update Action Plan Status* 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto update the PMT Task (Milestone) “Task Completion %” field
Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When I updated the PMT Task “Task Status” = ‘In Progress' (AC1)
And the system auto executed the Action Plan Template
Then the system shall update the PMT Task’s “Task Completion %” field based on each Task status in the Action Plan is updated:

* ”# of Completed Tasks” divided by “Total Tasks” to calculate the percentage (Ignore the Cancelled Task if any).
* “No. of Completed Tasks” update the task when each Action Plan Task is completed

And when the all the Action Plan Tasks are completed
Then the system shall update the PMT Task “Task Completion %” field = 100%

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3202, PR1050558-3203, PR1050558-3310 * Link to template [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gM9YFc0Fu9zy1aaFFZDoWHgCtqD3INIO/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true|https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gM9YFc0Fu9zy1aaFFZDoWHgCtqD3INIO/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true|smart-link]
* Field = Term Sheet Executed, creation part of [+PR1050558-1794+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1794]

Doc Gen, Use the sample document provided to generate template.

DR and Transform
From Clinician Contract, extract PNC from which you will get the HPF and ServiceAccounts.
Query the CPA of the Contract and group them by the HPF.
To get the Job details, HPF > Job_Applicant__c > Job > Job Title


|Contract.Employment_Type__c|Contract.Time_Type__C|Shift Type|Compensation| |
|Employee (EE)|Full Time|NP/PA (HPF> FacilityTitle > CodeSetType.)|Contract.EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Monthly_Blended__c| |
|Employee (EE)|Part time|NP/PA (HPF> FacilityTitle > CodeSetType.)|Contract.EE_NPPA_Hourly_Blended__c| |
|All others| |PCA.Shift__r.FullName or PCA.Type__r.Name (whichever is populated)| |, PCA.Rate__c, PCA.UnitofMeasure__c|

NOTE:
SCP mentioned there would be only one HPF in this scenario. However we have to accommodate for multiple HPFs, hence group them per HPF. Use the _OR repeat per HPF format in this document_

 0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Updates story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2811|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2811|smart-link]updates to original story in bold

Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician Contract record
And the following criteria is met:

* Contract Status = “Approved“
And
* [This is a new Contract (Previous Contract field is blank)
OR
* Clinician is an Independent Contractor (IC) moving to Employee (EE) employment type]

Then I shall have the ability to click “Generate Term Sheet”, (should NOT be displayed if the criteria above is not met)

Then a document is generated with the following template (attachment = *Conditional Offer Letter (7)*),
And the following fields are pulled into the merge fields with the initiating Clinician/Contract details

*Conditional Offer Letter (7)* - merge fields listed below:

* Date = [today’s date]
* Clinician/Clinician Name = Contract.AccountID
* Clinician contact info = [Clinician’s > Mailing Address]
* Insert Title = [ATS Applicant’s > Job > Job Title] (Note: multiple values should NOT be an issue, should only have one job title. *_If there are multiple, add multiple values separated by commas_*)
* {color:#bf2600}-Insert Name = [ATS Applicant’s > Hiring Manager’s Name] (Note: multiple values should NOT be an issue.-{color}{color:#bf2600} {color}{color:#bf2600}*REMOVE From Template*{color}
* Position = [ATS Applicant’s > Job > Job Title]
* Position Type = Contract.Time_Type__c
* Start Date = Contract.StartDate
* Locations = [Display the contract’s -active- HPFs Service Account name (*Include related HPFs to the Clinician Contract that are in Status = “Prospect” and “Candidate”*)]
* Compensation = [Display the Rates, see below for logic to display]
** If Employment Type = Employee (EE) AND Time Type = Full Time AND Shift Type = NP/PA, then display:
*** Contract’s “EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended”
*** Format = [EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended] per Month
**** Example: $200.00 per Month
** If Employment Type = Employee (EE) AND Time Type = Part Time AND Shift Type = NP/PA, then display:
*** Contract’s “EE NP/PA Hourly Blended”
*** Format = [EE NP/PA Hourly Blended] per Hour
**** Example: $55.00 per Hour
** Else, display all Type of Rates (Shift, *Bonus, Leadership Incentives, Variable, Stipend, Target, Locum*)
*** Shift:
**** Display: [Shift Full Name] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]
*** *Bonus:*
**** *Display: [Type] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]*
*** *Leadership Incentive:*
**** *Display: [Type] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]*
*** *Variable:*
**** *Display: [Type] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]*
*** *Stipend:*
**** *Display: [Type] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]*
*** *Target:*
**** *Display: [Rate] [Unit of Measure]*
*** *Locum:*
**** *Display: [Type =* Shifts Requested*] [Shift Requested (#)] [Unit of Measure =* _per Month_*]*
**** *Display: [Type] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]*
* {color:#bf2600}-Anticipated Monthly Clinical Hours = [Contract> Anticipated Clinical Hours]-{color}{color:#bf2600} - {color}{color:#bf2600}*REMOVE from template*{color}
* Special Terms = [Contract > Contract Special Terms]
** *ONLY display in the template when populated.*
** *If Special Terms is blank, then this field within the template shall NOT be displayed.*
* SCP Employee Name = User.FirstName + User.LastName
* SCP Employee Title = User.Title

And a preview of the generated document is displayed to the initiating user

And Additional actions:

* Cancel
** nothing is generated
** Returned to the Clinician Contact
* Finish
** Then the document is attached to Contract (RT: Clinician) record as a File (file name = <ClinicianFullName><FacilityName(s)><DateSent>-Termsheet.pdf) Note to Business: we can follow this format provided, a single contract can have multiple HPFs, so in that scenario we will be listing all.
** And user is returned to the Contract record page.
** Guided Experience is closed
** User is returned to Clinician Contract 		08/Dec/25 9:38 AM   4 Screenshot 2025-09-22 at 9.23.00 AM.png 25/Sep/25 2:00 PM SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT), SCP Sprint 12 25/Sep/25 2:00 PM 1|i0f1ef: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a recruiter, I the ability to generate a term sheet so that I can expedite the contracting process prior to engaging the Clinician Contracting Specialist team.

Generate Term Sheet - Term Sheet Generation - Add Other Type of Rates

None

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3094, PR1050558-3030, PR1050558-3283 * Field creation part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924|smart-link]
* Security -
** Persona that have Edit access PMT = Implementation Specialist
** Permission Set = *Manage Client Onboarding*
*** Follow the Security Matrix for permission
** Permission Set = *View Client Onboarding*
*** Follow the Security Matrix for permission
** Update *Permission Set Groups*:
*** Permission Set Group = *Corporate Support*
**** Add Permission set = View Client Onboarding
*** Permission Set Group = *Client Onboarding*
**** Add Permission set = Action Plans Extension

AC1: Create PMT Project (All are from Out of the Box PMT Project Item) & AC2.2: PMT Project - Use this Template & AC2.2: PMT Project - Use this Template

# User Navigates to the PMT Project where IsTemplate? = True
# User use the Use This Template button to Create new PMT Project
# User enters the start date and project name
# user can select the PMT Phase
# user can select the PMT Tasks within the Phase

Once the PMT Project is created user navigates to the PMT Project and setup the Opportunity lookup

Flow: record triggered flow after save in PMT Project that update the Opportunity.PMT_Project__c with the inov8__PMT_Project__c.Id



AC3: PMT Phase

# -Validation Rule: when Account field changes using ISCHANGED and inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c is blank then error “Service Account can be be setup in Phase when only PMT Project is related to an Opportunity”-
# Flow: When user setup Service_Account__c to PMT Phase check
## if inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c is blank then error “Service Account can be be setup in Phase when only PMT Project is related to an Opportunity”
## if the Service Account is Part of Service__c using Service__c.Opportunity__c = inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c AND Service__c.Account__c= inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c AND Service__c.Status__c = ‘Active’ if no matching service account is found then Error “Service Account must be related to the Opportunity Service and must be in Active Status”
## if no error update the inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Name = inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Name (truncate to 80 chanracters)



AC4: PMT Task

Then on the PMT Task record the user should not be able to update the “Task Status” = “In Progress” if the PMT Phase is missing a “Service Account”.

* Validation Rule: When Status = In Progress AND inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c is blank then error “Please identify the Service Account associated with the PMT Phase.“

And “IsTemplate?” = False/not checked, then do not allow users to edit the PMT Task field = “Task Name”

* Validation Rule: when inov8__Phase__r.inov8__Project__r.inov8__IsTemplate__c = false and ISCHANGED(inov8__PMT_Task__c.Name)
** Error Message: You cannot edit the Task Name (Milestone). 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Create PMT Project
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to *create a PMT Project*
-Then there should be a related list to the Opportunity-

* -Filter: Record type: Opportunity Growth-
* -Columns to display: Opportunity Name, Stage, Target Contract Start Date, Closed Date, Incremental Margin-

-And- the following tabs visible: Chatter & Activity, Details, Summary, Tasks, Files-, -Related--

User can see have the ability to update the Opportunity in the PMT Project Record using the Opportunity Lookup in Details Tab

When the user relate the Opportunity in the PMT Project the corresponding Opportunity PMT Project gets automatically update by the system

AC2.1: PMT Project - Clone Phases/Tasks
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to *create a PMT Project*
Then from the PMT Project record they should have the ability to “Clone Phases/Tasks” when “IsTemplate”= False

AC2.2: PMT Project - Use this Template
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to *create a PMT Project*
Then from the PMT Project record they should have the ability to “Use this Template” when “IsTemplate”= True

AC3: PMT Phase
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to create *PMT Phase*
Then on the PMT Phase record there should be a field:

* Service Account (lookup to Account RT: Service Account)

And Service Account that is added is related to the opportunity, if not display message:

* Error Message: -Service Account must be related to the Opportunity.- Service Account must be related to the Opportunity Service and must be in Active Status.

And when the “Service Account” is successfully added, then the system shall update the “Phase Name” field with the Service Account Name.

AC4: PMT Task
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a user has access to create PMT Task
Then on the PMT Task record the user should not be able to update the “Task Status” = “In Progress” if the PMT Phase is missing a “Service Account”.

* Error Message: Please identify the Service Account associated with the PMT Phase.

And “IsTemplate?” = False/not checked, then do not allow users to edit the PMT Task field = “Task Name”

* Error Message: You cannot edit the Task Name (Milestone).

AC5: View access for internal Corporate Support Users

Given I am a internal Corporate Support User
When I am in the Corporate Support Apps
Than I have the ability to view: PMT Project, PMT Phase, PMT Task, & PMT Gantt View
And I shall have *read only* access to PMT Project, PMT Phase, & PMT Task records



----

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3032, PR1050558-3096, PR1050558-3290 When the user clicks the “*Refresh Client Rates*”

Apex Code

# For Each ProviderNetworkContract Record in the Clinician Contract
## Get the latest +relevant+ Practice Operation Contract
### ProviderNetworkContract.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId = [Contract.AccountId|http://Contract.Id] and [*Contract.*|http://Contract.Id]*StartDate <= ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.StartDate* AND [Contract.|http://Contract.Id]RecordType= Practice Operation and [Contract.|http://Contract.Id]Status = “Executed” Order By [Contract.|http://Contract.Id]StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
### Get all the *Practice Operation* PreventiveCareAgreement record where ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Stipend OR Shift OR Variable OR Target OR Leadership Incentives and Facility_Title__c = ProviderNetworkContract.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.Facility_Title__c. Loop through each records
#### For ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift”
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = false use PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c-PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c, [PreventiveCareAgreement.Id|http://PreventiveCareAgreement.Id] (use a List<String, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Shift Active Records]*
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = true then use PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c-PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c, [PreventiveCareAgreement.Id|http://PreventiveCareAgreement.Id] (use a List<String, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Shift Deleted Records]*
#### For ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c != “Shift”
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = false use PreventiveCareAgreement.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c (use a List<Id, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Other Type Active Records]*
##### use When Is_Deleted__c = true use PreventiveCareAgreement.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c (use a List<Id, Map<Id, Number>>) *[Other Type Deleted Records]*
## Get all the *Clinician Contract* PreventiveCareAgreement record where -Cloned_From__c != null AND- ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Stipend OR Shift OR Variable OR Target OR Leadership Incentives and Loop through each records
### Process Shift Records
#### For *[Clinician]* ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = “Shift” use PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c-PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c compare the Rates from Step 1.a.ii.1 and when the [Practice Operation].PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c > *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c then update the *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c *(use [Shift Active Records] Map)*
#### If there are any shift that is not available in the Practice Operation Contract then delete the Shift from Clinician Contract *(Use [Shift Deleted Records])*
#### Update the *[Clinician].*Facility_Rate__c to the [*Practice Operation.CAP*].Id *when its same*
### Process Other Records
#### For *[Clinician]* ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c != “Shift” use PreventiveCareAgreement.Type__c, PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c compare the Rates from Step 1.a.ii.2 and when the *[Practice Operation]*.PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c > *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c then update the *[Clinician]*PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c *(Use [Other Type Active Records])*
#### If there are any ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c that is not available in the Practice Operation Contract then delete from Clinician Contract *(Use [Other Type Deleted Records])*
#### Update the *[Clinician].*Facility_Rate__c to the [*Practice Operation .CPA*].Id *when its same*
## Once complete update today to Contract.Last_Synched_Date__c

Button should be visibly only for Draft Clinician Contract 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: “*Refresh Client Rates*”

Given I am an Contracting specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When I am on a *Clinician contract in Status = Draft*
Then on the Summary tab, I have the ability to “**Refresh Client Rates**” for *all HPFs Type of Rates*; *except for 'Bonus'*
And for each of the Clinician’s rates,

# The system shall pull in the rate from the relevant Practice Operations contract and populate the “Facility Rate”. (Status = Executed AND Clinician Contract Start Date falls within the Practice Operations Contract Start Date)
# If the “Facility Rate” is greater than the current “Rate”, then system shall update the “Rate”.
# If the system is unable to find a matching Facility Rate / Facility Rate has been removed on the Practice Operations contract, then the system shall *hard delete the rate* on the Clinician contract. (Rate = Preventive Care Agreement record & related Rate Pay Codes)
# When the user selects “Configure Rates” button, then on the ‘Rate Details’ step they are able to to view the updated ‘Facility Rate’ and ‘Rate’ (if #2 was met)
# If Clinician contract Status ≠ Draft, then the system should hide/disable the “**Refresh Client Rates**” button.
# When the user clicks “*Refresh Client Rates*”, then the user can view the Last Synched Date as a timestamp on Summary page of Clinician contract.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3033, PR1050558-3097, PR1050558-3297 # Create a Button
# Create Flex Card for Each Section
# Create Omni Script for Each Section (7 Screens in Total)
## After Save of Each Configuration Refresh the Configuration Screen

Create Flex Card for each Section and the Fields are available part of Data Dictionary



Each Section is of Represented by Contract.Contract_Type__c and Contract.RT: Client Contract

Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master” (1 record for each Client Contract)
Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Terms & Renewals” (1 or more for each Client Contract)
Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Compensation” (1 or more for each Client Contract)
Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Protection” (1 or more for each Client Contract)
Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Insurance” (1 or more for each Client Contract)
Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Special Terms” (1 or more for each Client Contract)
Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Legal Terms” (1 or more for each Client Contract)
Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Termination” (1 or more for each Client Contract)



Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master”

* Data Stored in Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master” and PNC Records

{color:#403294}(Contract Type is Read Only on page) {color}[~accountid:712020:2999e508-c1cb-48df-9844-5dd5ebb612c0] [~accountid:61f8618e8d9e3c00688e380b] added this since in DD but not implemented.



Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Terms & Renewals” , “Compensation”, “Protection”, “Insurance”, “Special Terms”, “Legal Terms”, “Termination”

* Contract.ParentContractId to relate Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master” (PreviousContractId is used when clonding)
* Data Stored in Contract.Contract_Type__c = each type listed above and Service Account relation stored in Contract_Provider_Network_Relation__c (Contract__c and Provider_Network_Contract__c)



Set the Security Matrix access for Contract Provider Network Relation object

Setup the Name for the Child Contract *Name* Records as ParentContract.ContractNumber + Current.Contract.Contract_Type__c
