!image-20251022-195903.png|width=749,alt="image-20251022-195903.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC5: Edit *Client Contracts [APPROVED]*
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I select a Client Contract (Client Agreement Request) record
And *Status = “Draft”*
And *Contract Type = “Master”*
Then I have the ability to *Edit the Details* of the contract [see [+PR1050558-3022+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3022] for fields]
And I shall have the ability to add *new* {color:#0747a6}('Add Configuration' button) {color}*-or edit existing related records-*: {color:#0747a6}[editing of existing records split to story {color}[{color:#0747a6}+PR1050558-3519+{color}|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3519]{color:#0747a6}]{color}

* Term & Renewals
* Compensation
* Protection
* Insurance
* Special Terms
* Legal Terms
* Termination

And from a related record, I have the *ability to link Service Account(s)* [linked via Provider Network Contract (PNC) record(s)]

* Service Account(s) that can be linked, must be linked to this Contract
* Service Account(s) can NOT be linked to more than one related record of the same type. (*see example below)
* Service Account(s) can be removed, but a related record MUST have at least one linked Service Account

And upon completion of ‘Add Configuration’, the system shall display the newly added record within it’s corresponding section.

{color:#0747a6}And from the Provider Network Contract record, the user shall have the ability to edit: (NOTE: user is not limited to these fields, but listing for traceability that they were moved to the PNC record){color}

* {color:#0747a6}Services Sold{color}
* {color:#403294}SCP Corporate Entity {color}
** {color:#403294}When the user populates the ‘SCP Corporate Entity{color}'{color:#403294}field, then the system shall update the ‘Healthcare Payer Network’ field based on the associated Account (RT: Corporate Entity). ({color}{color:#403294}_note: since 'Healthcare Payer Network’ is a required field, prior to this the system had defaulted it to use the Corporate Entity TBD’s Healthcare Payer Network record._{color}{color:#403294}){color}

*Example: of positive and negative scenarios

You have 5 Service Accounts (SA-EM, SA-HM, SA-CC, SA-WW, SA-PC)
And you have 2 Term & Renewal records & 3 Special Terms, then:

Positive scenario:
Term & Renewal #1: SA-EM, SA-HM, SA-CC
Term & Renewal #2: SA-WW, SA-PC

Special Terms #1: SA-EM
Special Terms #2: SA-HM
Special Terms #3: SA-CC, SA-WW, SA-PC

Negative scenario:
Term & Renewal #1: SA-EM, SA-HM, *SA-CC*
Term & Renewal #2: SA-WW, SA-PC, *SA-CC*

Special Terms #1: SA-EM
Special Terms #2: SA-HM, *SA-PC*
Special Terms #3: SA-CC, SA-WW, *SA-PC* 		08/Dec/25 9:38 AM   4 image-20250923-113046.png 23/Sep/25 8:33 PM SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT), SCP Sprint 12 23/Sep/25 8:33 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzyzv 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a Legal team member, I want to Edit a Client Contract in status = Draft, so that I can capture the necessary information and track it through the execution process. 04/Nov/25

!image-20251023-165414.png|width=927,alt="image-20251023-165414.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC4: View *Client Contracts [APPROVED]*
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I select a Client Contract (Client Agreement Request) record [From: Contract tab list view = “Open Client Contract Requests” [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1736|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1736|smart-link] or from the Opportunity’s Contract related list [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2166|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2166|smart-link] ]
Then I shall have the ability to view Provider Network Contract(s) -Service Account(s)- linked to this contract on new *tab =* {color:#403294}*“Provider Network Contracts”*{color} {color:#403294}-“Service Accounts”-{color}

* Fields to display in Related List {color:#403294}(see mock below){color}: {color:#403294}Service Account Name, SCP Corporate Entity, Name (Provider Network Contract auto number -link), Client Termination Date, {color}{color:#403294}-Start Date (Sort By - most recent/descending order)-{color}{color:#403294}, {color}{color:#403294}-End Date(removed - start and end date are not valid PNC fields)-{color}

And ability to view the *Details* of the contract:

* Left column:
** Contract Number
** Contract Name
** Account Name
** {color:#403294}-SCP Corporate Entity-{color}{color:#403294} REMOVED, lives on PNC{color}
** Description
** Contract Start Date
** Contract End Date
* Right column:
** -Agreement Effective Date- REMOVED, this lives on Term & Renewals, not Master
** Agreement Category
** Contract Record Type
** Category
** Status
** Requested By
** Contract Owner
** Parent Contract (replaces Master Agreement field)
** Previous Contract
** Source Opportunity
** Pro Forma Model
** -Number of Service Accounts-
* Section = Key Dates
** Left column:
*** Requested Date
*** Date Sent For Internal Review
*** Other Party Sent Date
*** Other Party Returned Date
*** Outstanding Days
** Right column:
*** Executed Copy Mailed Out Date
*** Activated Date
*** Activated By
*** Date Distributed
*** Total Process Days

And on *tab = Configurations*, I shall have the ability to view the following related records: {color:#0747a6}[Split viewing of sections and records to {color}[+PR1050558-3519+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3519]{color:#0747a6}, this story will just create the “Configurations” tab]{color}

* -Term & Renewal-
* -Compensation-
* -Protection-
* -Insurance-
* -Special Terms-
* -Legal Terms-
* -Termination-

{color:#0747a6}-And if a select an individual related record, then I can view:-{color}{color:#0747a6}[split to story {color}[+PR1050558-3519+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3519]{color:#0747a6}]{color}

* {color:#0747a6}-Fields: See Data Dictionary for each type of Related Record’s fields.-{color}
* {color:#0747a6}-User shall have the ability view linked Provider Network Contract(s-{color}{color:#0747a6}) {color}-Service Account(s)-

And when viewing the related records:

* -I have the ability to- *-filter by a specific Service Account-*{color:#0747a6}[spilt to story PR1050558-3020]{color}
** -System displays the related records that contain the selected Service Account-
** -If user removes the filter, then system displays all related records-
** -Ability to view all the detailed fields [expanded]-
* -Related Records are group by type: (collapsible sections, expanded by default)- {color:#0747a6}[split to story {color}[+PR1050558-3519+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3519]{color:#0747a6}]{color}
** -Term & Renewals-
** -Compensation-
** -Protection-
** -Insurance-
** -Special Terms-
** -Legal Terms-
** -Termination-
* -AND when NO Service Account [Provider Network Contract record] filter is applied, then records displayed within each section will only displaying high-level details (Name and related Provider Network Contract (PNC)/Service Accounts)- {color:#0747a6}[split to story {color}[+PR1050558-3519+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3519]{color:#0747a6}]{color}
** -User will select a specific record to view all the details-

And the order of the Tabs on the Client Contract shall be: (left to right)

* Details (default)
* {color:#403294}Provider Network Contracts{color}
* Configurations - BUILT as part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3519|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3519|smart-link]

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3099, PR1050558-3035, PR1050558-3294 Story will Create below items

# Contract RT: Client Contract
# PNC Records (with the Opportunity Service Selected)



* New Contract RecordType = Client Contract
** Contract Start Date: User Input
** Contract End Date (optional)
** Contract Name (required)
** -SCP Corporate Entity -Picklist (Select )-
** Agreement Category (required)
** Contract.SourceOpportunityId = [Opportunity.Id|http://Opportunity.Id] when the Contract is saved
** Contract.Requested_Date__c = Case.CreatedDate (part of solution for [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2807|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2807|smart-link] )
** Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master”
** AccountId = Case.Opportunity__r.AccountId
** Status = Draft
** Contract Owner = Current User
** Pro_Forma_Model__c = [SELECT Id FROM Pro_Forma_Model__c WHERE Opportunity__c = Case.Opportunity__c AND Status__c = “Approved for Contracting” ORDER BY LastModified DESC LIMIT 1]
** Requested By = Case.Opportunity__r.Owner
* -And have NOT been already linked the Service Account record(s) to a Client Contract related to the Opportunity.-
** -Query for SELECT Account__c FROM Service__c WHERE Status__c = “Active” AND Opportunity__c = Contract.SourceOpportunityId AND Id NOT IN (SELECT Related_Opty_Service_Id__c FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.RecorType.DeveloperName = 'Client_Contract' AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master” AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.AccountId = Contract.SourceOpportunityId.AccountId- -_AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Contract_Type__c.Status NOT IN (Expired, Abandoned, Terminated)_- -)-
** -When Contract is created Setup ProviderNetworkContract.Related_Opty_Service_Id__c = Service__c.Id ( only for the Parent Contract Type = ‘Master’)-



When the Contract Records is created update the Case.Status = “In Progress”

Provider Network Contract Record created with

ProviderNetworkContract.Service_Account__c = Service__c.Account__c

ProviderNetworkContract.Related_Opty_Service_Id__c = Service__c.Id

{color:#bf2600}ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcarePayerNetworkId = Select Id from HealthcarePayerNetwork WHERE Name = “{color}{color:#bf2600}*Corporate Entity TBD*{color}{color:#bf2600}“{color}

ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProviderId = Select Id from HealthcareProvider Where AccountId = Service__c.Account__c)

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC3: *New* Client Contract [APPROVED]
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I am on a Case (record type = Client Agreement Request)
And Case Status = “Not Started” or “In Progress”
Then from the Case record, I can initiate the “Configure Contract” guided experience (“Configure Contract” is NOT available if Case Status = “Closed')
And the system shall allow the user to capture the following information:

* Contract Start Date (required)
* Contract End Date (optional)
* Contract Name (required)
* -SCP Corporate Entity (optional, NEW lookup field NOTE SCP Corporate Entity should use party role relationship = Services Contracting Entity)-
** 10/22: REMOVED. Used to hold: Legal entity for SCP. Decision to move field to the PNC level where the user will manually input.
* Agreement Category (required)
* -Agreement Effective Date (optional)- REMOVED, this lives on Term & Renewals, not Master

And the system shall allow the user to link Service Account record(s) that are related to the Opportunity’s Services that are in Status = Active

* -And have NOT been already linked the Service Account record(s) to a Client Contract related to the Opportunity.- [Service Accounts will be linked to the Client Contract via Provider Network Contract records]
* And user must select at least one Service Account to proceed.
** Display - Service Account & Type
* And if NO service accounts, then display the following message, user will need to cancel out of the flow.
** No available Service Accounts found. Please verify that your Opportunity has active Services -or check if the Service Accounts are already linked to another Client Contract-.

And the following navigation options shall be available:

* Cancel
** No contract record is created
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the Case record
* Finish
** a New Contract (Record Type: Client Contract) is created with information captured and the following additional info:
*** Status = “Draft”
*** Contract Owner = <user who initiate the “Configure Contract”>
*** Account Name = <Account Name from the related Opportunity>
*** Source Opportunity = <related opportunity>
*** Pro Forma Model = <Pro Forma Model in Status = Approved for Contracting” from Opportunity>
*** Requested By = <opportunity Owner>
*** Contract Type = “Master”
** Case Status set to “In Progress”
*** User to update Status to “Closed” & Closed Reason = “Completed” once done creating Client Contracts
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the new Contract record 		08/Dec/25 9:38 AM   5 Screenshot 2025-11-06 at 11.32.44 PM.png 23/Sep/25 8:20 PM SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT), SCP Sprint 12 23/Sep/25 8:20 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzyyi 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a Legal team member, when I receive a Client Agreement Request from the Sales VP, I want to create a new Client Contract(s) so that I can capture the necessary information and track it through the execution process. 30/Oct/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3036, PR1050558-3100, PR1050558-3295 In Omni Script:

The Picklist display the list of Account records from ProviderNetworkContract.ContractId = [Contract.Id|http://Contract.Id] (the Contract where Contract_Type__c = Master) display ProviderNetworkContract.Service_Account__r.Name (also [ProviderNetworkContract.Id|http://ProviderNetworkContract.Id] needed for next step to filter)

Button Click “Show Service Account Configuration”

Field all Contract record identified by Contract.ParentContractId = [Contract.Id|http://Contract.Id] (the Contract where Contract_Type__c = Master) filter by

ProviderNetworkContract Service Account Records

Query: Select Id, (Contract Field) FROM Contract WHERE Contract.ParentContractId = [Contract.Id|http://Contract.Id] AND [Contract.Id|http://Contract.Id] IN (Select Contract__c FROM Contract_Provider_Network_Relation__c Where Provider_Network_Contract__c = [ProviderNetworkContract.Id|http://ProviderNetworkContract.Id] (from selection)



Display all section in an expanded view like below *(View ONLY no other Actions)*



When the selected PNC has no configurations, display the following message:
No Records Found. The selected Service Account does not have any configurations to display. Please choose a different account.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3158, PR1050558-3159, PR1050558-3243 * Field = Term Sheet Executed, creation part of [+PR1050558-1794+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1794] 0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Split from [+PR1050558-2811+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2811]+.+ Updates in *bold* based on new picklist field. Also we implemented a List View in story 1809 that needs to be updated based on the new picklist.

Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps
When I am on Contract record page,
And I click “Send Term Sheet for Signature”
When No Term Sheet present:
Show message to user “Please generate term sheet before sending for signature”.
When Term sheet is already generated (based on file attachments)
Then the document is sent via DocuSign to the Clinician’s email address on the related Person Account record

* Recipient = Clinician’s Email
* CC = Recruiter (user’s email)

Given I am a Clinician Contracting Specialist within the Corporate Support apps
When the document is signed by the Clinician,
And the Integration (via DocuSign) has updated the Contract field *“Term Sheet Status” = Signed/Executed* -“Term Sheet Executed” = checked-
Then from the Contract tab List View (existing, needs to be updated) = *Clinician - Approved & Term Sheet Exectd* -Clinician Term Sheet Executed-

* Filter = Contract Record Type = Clinician, AND {color:#403294}({color}Status = Approved OR Term *“Term Sheet Status” = Signed/Executed* -Sheet Executed = true/checked-)
* Fields to Display: Contract Number, Account Name, Employment Type, Status, *Term Sheet Status* -Term Sheet Executed-, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Approval Date, Previous Contract, Contract Owner Alias

And I navigate to a clinician Contract record with a term sheet

And I navigate to Files section (Files Tab on Contract),
Then I can view the Signed Term sheet document as file attached there.

NOTE: for confirmed during refinement that we want to pull the stars for the term sheet location & compensation (rate + unit of measure)

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3054, PR1050558-3118, PR1050558-3303 AC1: Set the Status value for Record Type = Client Contract



AC2:

Requested Date: When the Contract is initially created from Case using “Configure Contract” (handled as part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3021|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3021|smart-link] ) button populate Contract.Requested_Date__c = Case.CreatedDate {color:#bf2600}*(NO BUILD IN THIS STORY)*{color}



Record Trigger Flow for Update when Contract Record Type = Client Contract and the field is initially populated

# Date Sent For Internal Review: Contract.Date_Sent_For_Internal_Review__c is updated Set Contract.Status = Submitted, Contract.Category__c = External
# Other Party Sent Date: Contract.Other_Party_Sent_Date__c is updated Set Contract.Status = Submitted, Contract.Category__c = External
# Activated Date: Contract.ActivatedDate AND Contract.ActivatedById IS Not Null then Contract.Status = Executed 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Client Contract Statuses
Given I am a System Administrator within the Corporate Support Apps
When I on Contract Record Type = Client Contact
Then the available ‘Status’ values are: (-read only on layout- can’t make it read only because it’s required. )

* Draft [Status Category: Draft] (Default value)
* Submitted [Status Category: In Approval Process]
* Executed [Status Category: Activated]
* Superseded [Status Category: Canceled]
* Abandoned [Status Category: Canceled]
* Expired [Status Category: Contract Expired]
* Terminated [Status Category: Contract Terminated]

AC2: Key Date field and system updates
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I navigate to a Client Contract record
Then based on updates to specific Key Date fields, the system will perform the specified *System Updates:*

|*Field Name*|*Description*|*System Updates*|
|Requested Date|When the case is received| |
|Date Sent For Internal Review|Internal submission status (*initial* draft circulated) (history tracking)|When field is initially populated, then set:
Status = Submitted
Category = Internal|
|Other Party Sent Date|First time sent to client (external submission) (history tracking)|When field is initially populated, then set:
Status = Submitted
Category = External|
|Other Party Returned Date|Receive feedback from external submission (history tracking)| |
|Outstanding Days|Read Only
formula - “requested date” to “Date Distributed”| |
|Executed Copy Mailed Out Date|Sent fully executed signed copy to the client (optional)| |
|Activated Date|Read Only
System inputted when the contract is signed - User initiates via “Activate Contract” action (part of story [+PR1050558-3351+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3351])|When the fields = ‘Activated Date’ & ‘Activated By’ are initially populated, then set:
Status = Executed|
|Activated By|Read Only
System inputs when
* User initiates via “Activate Contract” action (Part of story [+PR1050558-3351+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3351])
* Also populates the user's info that “Activate”
* system updates Status = Executed|See rule in ‘Activated Date’|
|Date Distributed|manual input - based on summary email that is shared with the organization| |
|Total Process Days|Read Only

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3058, PR1050558-3122, PR1050558-3276 * New field creation:
** Object = Provider Network Contract
*** ‘Services Sold’ (multi-select) [~accountid:61f8618e8d9e3c00688e380b] can we make this a global picklist, I need it for Letter of Intent and maybe PMT Phase
*** “Client Termination Date” (date)
*** “Client Termination Time” (time)
*** “Client Termination Time Zone”
*** “Terminated By” (picklist)
** Update FLS on the following permission sets:
*** *Manage Client Onboarding*
*** *View Client Onboarding*


Use a Screen Flow:

* Account / Hospital Name : ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Name
* Service Line: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Service_Line__r.Name
* Services Sold: ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Services Sold
* Physical Address: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.BillingAddress
* City: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.BillingCity
* State: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.BillingStateCode
* Zip: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.Zip
* Facility Short Name: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Parent.Facility_Short_Name__c
* Staffing Team: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Staffing_Team__c
* Client Division: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Client_Division__c
* Client Region: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Client_Region__c
* Client Termination Date: ProviderNetworkContract.Contract_Termination__c
* Client Termination Time: ProviderNetworkContract.Facility_Termination_Time__c
* Client Termination Time Zone: ProviderNetworkContract.Client_Termination_Time_Zone__c
* Terminated By: ProviderNetworkContract.Terminated_By__c
* Billing Company: ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.Account.Billing_Company__c
* Corporate Entity: Query SELECT RelatedAccount.Name FROM AccountAccountRelation WHERE AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProviderId.AccountId AND PartyRoleRelationId = (SELECT Id FROM PartyRoleRelation WHERE RoleName = 'Services Contracting Entity') AND StartDate =< Today() and (EndDate >= Today() OR EndDate is NULL) Order BY AccountAccountRelation.StartDate ASEC LIMIT 1
* Scribe Hours per Day: Select Scribe_Hours_per_Day__c from Contract where RecordType = Practice Operation and Status = “Executed” and StartDate < Today() and AccountId = ProviderNetworkContract.HealthcareProvider.AccountId Order by Start Date DESC LIMIT 1 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1:
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support apps
When I completed the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]] from an executed Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
Then from the Contract (RT: Client Contract), I am able to navigate to the Related Service Account records via *Provider Network Contract*
And I select a specific *Provider Network Contract* for the Service Account
And I am able to “Send Offboarding Email” (design is “Send Offboarding Email” is a button)
And in the “Send Offboarding Email” guided experience the user shall have the option to indicate:

* “Revision” (checkbox, unchecked by default)
* If “Revision”is checked, then allow the user to capture Revision Number (-2, 0,- required)

And the Email shall contain the following information:

* To = [DL.Notice Of Operations Changes [DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com|mailto:DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com]] – *PRODUCTION email*
* Email Subject = Client Termination Notice - <Service Account> <Termination Date>
** or if Revision is selected = Client Termination Notice - <Service Account> <Termination Date>*Rev <revision number>*
* Email Body =
Client Termination Notice
<insert the Field Name and Value>

And create a closed email task with

* Task Record Type = Default
* Subject = “Client Termination Notice - <Service Account> <Termination Date>”
* Comments/Description = < email body >
* Type = Email
* Related to <Service Account>

||*Field Name to be displayed in the Email body*||*Example:*||*Value to display:*||
|Account / Hospital Name|Morgan Medical Center|Account Name [Name] (service account name)|
|Service Line|EM|Service Line [Service_Line__c]|
|Global Facility ID|1453|Global Facility ID [Global_Facility_ID__c]|
|Services Sold|Recruiting;Candidate Pre-Screen (Facility Cred);Scheduling;Provider Enrollment;Coding;Billing|*NEW Field on PNC* - ‘Services Sold’: (multi-select)

Candidate Pre-Screen (Facility Cred)
Scheduling
Provider Enrollment
Coding
Billing
Privileging (CVO)
Leased Providers
Managed Providers
Billing Pro Fee
Coding Pro Fee
Tele-Hybrid
Tele-Triage
Tele-Admitter
Tele-Rounder
Tele-Nocturnist
Tele-Consults|
|Physical Address|1740 Lions Club Rd|Parent Account (Facility/Hospital) > Physical Address [BillingAddress]

|City|Madison|See Physical Address|
|State|GA|See Physical Address|

|Facility Short Name|Morgan MC|Parent Account (Facility/Hospital) > Facility Short Name [Facility_Short_Name__c]|

|Client Division|II|Client Division [Client_Division__c]|
|Client Region|II|Client Region [Client_Region__c]|

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3059, PR1050558-3123, PR1050558-3275 Check if Flow Close Related Cases is already covering the Case Close if not update the Flow 0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto Close Child Case - Closed /Complete
Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps
*When all of the Task records related to a Client Offboarding Child Case are Closed (Status = Completed or Canceled)*
And the child Case record does not already have Status = Closed
Then the child Case is automatically updated to:

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Complete

-AC2: Auto Close Child Case - Closed /Canceled- [moved to story 1684]
-Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps-
*-When there are NO Task records related to a Client Offboarding Child Case-*
-And the child Case record does not already have Status = Closed-
-Then the child Case is automatically updated to:-

* -Status = Closed-
* -Closed Reason = Canceled-

AC3: Auto Close Parent Case

Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps
*When all of the child Case records related to a Client Offboarding Parent Case are Status = Closed & Closed Reason = Completed or Canceled)*
And the Parent Case record does not already have Status = Closed
Then the Parent Case is automatically updated to:

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Complete

NOTE: added AC2 since we had an open action item on 1684, we are unsure all the which cases to create or not create in story 1683. - If we can align on 1684 (tasks), then we can add an enhancement story to just NOT create the child case based on the service line, rendering AC2 obsolete.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3300, PR1050558-3065, PR1050558-3129 * Update Contract (RT:Letter of Intent)
** Field = Status - update the values
** Read only on page/layout



Record Triggered Flow on Case RT: Letter of Intent

Requested Date → CreatedDate

Date Sent For Internal Review → When Contract.Status = “Submitted” update the date

Other Party Returned Date → User Updated (Manual)

Outstanding Days → See Data Dictionary

Executed Copy Mailed Out Date → User Updated (Manual)

Activated Date, Activated By → handled as part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3468|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3468|smart-link]

Date Distributed → User Updated (Manual)

Total Process Days → See Data Dictionary 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Letter of Intent contract Statuses
Given I am a System Administrator within the Corporate Support Apps
When I on Contract Record Type = Letter of Intent
Then the available ‘Status’ values are: (-read only on layout. NOTE: system admin should have the ability to edit.- can’t make it read only because it’s required. )

* Draft [Status Category: Draft] (Default value)
* Submitted [Status Category: In Approval Process]
* Executed [Status Category: Activated]
* Superseded [Status Category: Canceled]
* Abandoned [Status Category: Canceled]
* Expired [Status Category: Contract Expired]
* Terminated [Status Category: Contract Terminated]

 

AC2: Key Date field and system updates
Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When I navigate to a Letter of Intent Contract record
Then based on updates to specific Key Date fields, the system will perform the specified updates

|*Field Name*|*Description*|*System Updates*|
|Requested Date|When the case is received| |
|Date Sent For Internal Review|Internal submission status (*initial* draft circulated) (history tracking)|When field is initially populated, then set:
Status = Submitted
Category = Internal|
|Other Party Sent Date|First time sent to client (external submission) (history tracking)|When field is initially populated, then set:
Status = Submitted
Category = External|
|Other Party Returned Date|Receive feedback from external submission (history tracking)| |
|Outstanding Days|Read Only
formula - “requested date” to “Date Distributed”| |
|Executed Copy Mailed Out Date|Sent fully executed signed copy to the client (optional)| |
|Activated Date|Read Only
System inputted when the contract is signed - User initiates via “Activate Contract” action (part of story [+PR1050558-3468+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3468])|When the fields = ‘Activated Date’ & ‘Activated By’ are initially populated, then set:
Status = Executed|
|Activated By|Read Only
System inputs when
* User initiates via “Activate Contract” action (part of story [+PR1050558-3468+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3468])
* Also populates the user's info that “Activate”
* system updates Status = Executed|See rule in ‘Activated Date’|
|Date Distributed|manual input - based on summary email that is shared with the organization| |
|Total Process Days|Read Only

Given I am a user in the “BD Finance” Deal Team/Opportunity Team Role or “BD Operations” queue within the Corporate Support Apps
And the Pro Forma Model Status = Approved for Contracting
And the system has created one Contract [Record Type: Practice Operations] per Opportunity Services in Status = Active
Then the system shall automatically create one task:

# Record Type = Default
# Subject = Populate the Shift Map & Rates template
# Assigned To =*BD Finance* OR if no Deal Team/Opportunity Team Role for *BD Finance*, then set to *Queue = “BD Operations”* (users will need to be individually assigned - PROD Zachary Kieffer)
# Status = Open
# Due Date = 1 business day
# Priority = Normal
# Name = BLANK
# Related To = Opportunity

AC2: Queue Creation

Given I am a user in the “BD Finance” Deal Team/Opportunity Team Role or “BD Operations” queue in Corporate Support Apps
When I navigate to the Tasks tab
Then I can see all the task assigned to the “BD Operations” queue (not assigned to an individual)
And Filtered by: Task Record Type = Default, Assigned To/Filter by Owner = “BD Operations”, Status = Open
Then I see the following columns: Subject, Related To, Status, Assigned To, Due Date, Priority, Last Modified Date/Time
And I can update the Assigned To field from the list view or from the record.

Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When the Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity) field = “LOI Complete” is checked/true
And “PMT Project” field is not populated
Then the system shall automatically create a *Task* to notify the users assigned to the “Implementation Queue” to create a new PMT Project:

* Record Type = Default
* Subject = Create a PMT Project for <Opportunity Name>
* Assigned To = Implementation Queue
* -Comments = 1. Please create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity 2. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 3. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”-
* Comments = 1. Create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity from PMT Template 2. Associate the Opportunity to the PMT Project record 3. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 4. For each PMT Phase associate the Service Account 5. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”
* Status = Open (default)
* Due Date =<+5 days from date of creation>
* Type = Client Onboarding
* Priority = Normal (default)
* Related To = <Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth)>

NOTE: if the criteria is met we will create a task, user can manually close (canceled) if they have not populated the “PMT Project” and a duplicate task is created. 		03/Nov/25 2:25 PM   5 19/Aug/25 2:18 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 09/Oct/25 10:30 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzly 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As an Implementation Specialist, when the Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity) updated to “LOI Executed”, I want a task to be automatically created for our team, so we know to manually create the PMT Project & Clone the Phases/Tasks which will be used to track the onboarding process for each Service Account.

16/Dec/25 9:09 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Maintenance Accepted   High ForWorkdayIntegration, TADesignComplete Bobbie Jo Folse   PR1050558-4285, PR1050558-4314 mario.miki Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2120

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2279, PR1050558-2335, PR1050558-2481 Flow Object : Contract
Condition : When contract is created
Scenario 1: Contract has been created first time for Practitioner

Check if the Contract does not have Hire date populated .

On the updated contract ( when status = executed), get the HPF via PNC.


Amongst the clinician contract’s HPFs (using PNC from the contract), find the earliest First Clinical Shift date of HPF where Contract.employee type is (Locum or Employee or IC or Leased) and stamp the First clinical Shift date on Contract’s hire date

Scenario 2: Practitioner is changing titles/transitioning. So check if another clinician contract is created for same Practitioner and SA (via PNC record) and there is no gap in date ( new contract’s start date is one day after current contract’s end date)


Flow on Clinician Contract

On the updated contract ( when status = executed), get the HPF from PNC.

Check if clinician has existing Executed Contract and get the HPF from PNC.
Check if the existing contract has Hire date value populated and if the existing Contract’s employee type is changed to one of the given values in the table in the new Contract’s emp type.
if so, copy the Hire date value from existing Contract to New Contract.

Scenario 3: If Contract.Employment_Type__c = ‘Employee’ clinicians and Contract.Start_Admin_Work_Ahead_of_Clinical_Work__c is checked , then Contract.Hire_Date__c = Company Signed date




|Old Contract Employment_Type__c|New Contract Employment_Type__c|Contract.Hire_Date__c|
|Locum|IC|First Clinical Shift|
|Locum|Employee|First Clinical Shift|
|Employee|IC|First Clinical Shift|
|Employee|Leased|Blank|
|IC|Employee|First Clinical Shift|
|IC|Leased|Blank|
|Leased|IC|First Clinical Shift|
|Leased|Employee|First Clinical Shift|

_If Start Administrative Work ahead of Clinical Work is checked for EE clinicians_, _then Contract._Hire_Date__c = Company Signed date



-Old notes:-

-Contract.Hire_Date__c -> Logic: Hire_Date__c = FOR EE and IC when Start_Admin_Work_Ahead_of_Clinical_Work__c = true then Hire_Date__c = CompanySignedDate, Update HPF.First_Clinical_Shift__c when Hire_Date__c is blank and clone Contract.Hire_Date__c field during contract modification-

-for all other Contract employment type leave blank- for conversion need to review as he /she might be already working on the location and there is no first clinical shift date perhaps the Hire_Date__c = CompanySignedDate?? if so need logic for conversion i.e Locum to IC- 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a HR team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record where they have changed *from Locums to Independent Contractor or Employee*
Then their hire date is First Clinical Shift for IC and First Clinical Shift for EE

Given I am a HR team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record where they have changed *from Employee to Independent Contractor or Leased*
Then their hire date is First Clinical Shift for IC and blank for Leased

Given I am a HR team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record where they have changed *from Independent Contractor to Employee or Leased*
Then their hire date is First Clinical Shift for EE and blank for Leased

Given I am a HR team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record where they have changed *from Leased to Independent Contractor or Employee*
Then their hire date is First Clinical Shift for IC and First Clinical Shift for EE

_note: dates are only updated the first time that First Clinical Shift is received_

_note: EE clinicians where Start Administrative Work ahead of Clinical Work is checked, will have a hire date of Company Signed Date (AKA when SCP signed the agreement)_

-When a clinician contract is populated with Start Admin Work Ahead of Clinical-
-Then the Hire Date field on Contract record is populated with the Company Signed Date-
-When First Clinical Shift is populated on HPF-
-Populate Hire Date on Contract object-

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3070, PR1050558-3134, PR1050558-2419, PR1050558-2420, PR1050558-3281 Create a new Action in Opportunity Name “Begin Client Onboarding” is visibly only when Opportunity Stage = “Validate Solution” or “Negotiate Contract & Close” and PMT Project = NULL

The button will create a task record as specified in the AC 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Manually trigger task to Create PMT Project
Given I am a Implementation Specialist or Opportunity Owner in the Corporate Support Apps
When I am on the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth) record
And the Opportunity Stage = “Validate Solution” or “Negotiate Contract & Close”
And “PMT Project” field is not populated
Then I have the ability to click “Begin Client Onboarding”
And the system shall automatically create a *Task* to notify the users assigned to the “Implementation Queue” to create a new PMT Project:

* Record Type = Default
* Subject = Create a PMT Project for <Opportunity Name>
* Assigned To = Implementation Queue
* -Comments = 1. Please create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity 2. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 3. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”-
* Comments = 1. Create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity from PMT Template 2. Associate the Opportunity to the PMT Project record 3. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 4. For each PMT Phase associate the Service Account 5. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”
* Status = Open (default)
* Due Date =<+5 days from date of creation>
* Type = Client Onboarding
* Priority = Normal (default)
* Related To = <Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth)>

NOTE: if the criteria is met we will create a task, user can manually close (canceled) if they have not populated the “PMT Project” and a duplicate task is created. 		03/Nov/25 2:25 PM   4 14/Aug/25 9:57 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 09/Oct/25 10:36 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzlzy 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As an Implementation Specialist or the Opportunity Owner, when I determine that client onboarding needs to begin early, I want the ability to trigger a task to be created for our team, so we know to manually create the PMT Project & Clone the Phases/Tasks which will be used to track the onboarding process for each Service Account. 13/Oct/25

Given I am a Legal Team member within the Corporate Support apps
When I complete the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]]
And a Parent Facility Offboarding Case has been created per selected Service Account(s) [Story [+PR1050558-1683+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683]]
And child cases for each Parent Facility Offboarding Case have been created [Story [+PR1050558-1683+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683]]
Then the system shall *automatically create task(s) related to each Child Case* based on [Document = Client Cases & tasks, tab = Offboarding|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Program%20Documentation/Program%20Execution/Client%20%26%20Clinician%20Experience/Client%20Cases%20%26%20Tasks.xlsx?d=w7f350716ce184e1eb38574b02403912d&csf=1&web=1&e=5LFbsm]:

* Criteria (column G)
** AND
* Service Account’s Service Line “Parent Service Line” (column H)

And Tasks shall be populated with the following information:

* Record Type = Default
* Subject = <column D>
* Related To = <column E>
* Assigned To = <column F>
* Status = Open
* Priority = Normal

And if there are *NO Account Team role member*, then assign to the Child Case Owner, so they can manually reassign the task as needed.

And if there are more than one *Account Team role member*, then assign to the *most recently added* member on the Service Account.

AC2: Auto Close Child Case - Closed /Canceled
Given I am a Legal Team member in the Corporate Support apps
*When there are NO Task records related to a Client Offboarding Child Case*
And the child Case record does not already have Status = Closed
Then the child Case is automatically updated to:

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Canceled

----

* Tasks for Child Case Subject: *Clinician Review*

** Notify Clinicians - Visa Impacted
** Notify Clinicians - Locums Impacted
** Retain MD/MLPs Effort
** Review Contracting for Buyout Language
* Tasks for Child Case Subject: *Client Systems Access*
** HPS Access
** Client Permission to Retain Remote Access
* Tasks for Child Case Subject: *Client Operations Close Out*
** Confirm Chart Completion
** Resolve Outstanding Enrollment Issues
** Malpractice Carrier Contract Closeout
** Confirm Scheduling Completion
** Marketing Removal
** Notify Telemedicine Vendor
** Communicate Closure to Nursing/Ancillary
** Communicate Program Transition to Onsite Team
* Tasks for Child Case Subject: *Client IT Operations Close Out*
** Terminate Hospital Interfaces
** HIT - My SCPCare APP
** Close mySCP Handoff Group
** Remove from mySCP Cares
* Tasks for Child Case Subject: *Equipment Return & Proprietary Materials*
** Hardware Collection
** Shred/Pack Proprietary Material

Given I am a Legal team member within the Corporate Support apps
When I complete the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]]
Then for *each* selected *Service Account (PNC),* a Parent Facility Offboarding Case shall be created: (do not create duplicates; update existing open case.)

* Record Type = Client Offboarding
* Status = Not Started
* Priority = Medium
* Origin = Manual
* Type = Facility
* Subject = "Facility Offboarding-<Account Name>"
* Case Owner = Account Team Role: VP Operations
* Account Name = <Service Account>
* Parent Case = BLANK
* Contract = <Contract RT: Client Contract>
* Termination Request Date = <PNC - Client Termination Date>
* Termination Request Time = <PNC - Client Termination Time>
* Provider Network Contract = <PNC>

And if there are *NO Account Team role member*, then assign to *user who initiated* the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience so they can manually reassign the case as needed.

And if there are more than one *Account Team role member*, then assign to the *most recently added* member.

AC2: Child Facility Offboarding Cases
Given I am a Legal team member within the Corporate Support apps
When I complete the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience [Story [+PR1050558-317+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-317]]
And for *each* Parent Facility Offboarding Case that is created [AC1]
Then the system shall automatically create the following child cases:

* Child Case Subject: Clinician Review
** Case Owner = Clinician Experience Specialist
* Child Case Subject: Client Systems Access
** Case Owner = Hospitalist Practice Manager
* Child Case Subject: Client Operations Close Out
** Case Owner = VP Operations
* Child Case Subject: Client IT Operations Close Out
** Case Owner = IT Infrastructure Queue (*NEW*)
* Child Case Subject: Equipment Return & Proprietary Materials
** Case Owner = Hospitalist Practice Manager

And child cases are populated with the following:

* Record Type = Client Offboarding
* Status = Not Started
* Priority = Medium
* Origin = Manual
* Type = Facility
* Account Name = <Service Account>
* Parent Case = <Parent Facility Offboarding Case>
* Contract = <Contract RT: Client Contract>

And if there are *NO Account Team role member*, then assign to *user who initiated* the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience so they can manually reassign the case as needed.

And if there are more than one *Account Team role member*, then assign to the *most recently added* member.

AC3:
Given I am a Internal Corporate Support user within the Corporate Support apps
And I have access to view the Case (RT: Client Offboarding) records & related tasks

# Create a Task
## Subject: Create New Clinician Contract
## Assigned To: {color:#403294}Clinician Experience Specialist{color}
## Related To: *Client Change Management* record 		0 Kristin Koide 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project {color:#403294}*Revised AC based on solution and updates to the Account Management Change excel on Type of Changes.*{color}
{color:#403294}(UPDATED AC based on Account Management column C - Type of Change: (Client Change Management - Process Type = Manual - {color}{color:#403294}*records created per story 3388*{color}{color:#403294}){color}

{color:#403294}AC1: Manual Clinician Contract creation is required{color}
{color:#403294}Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#403294}When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’ {color}

– identifying type of change is covered in story 3388
[{color:#403294}And one of the below type of change(s) has occurred: (Client Change Management records are create as part of {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3388|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3388|smart-link] )

* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Notification - Coverage + Rate Increase*{color}
** {color:#403294}Any new shift for same type added but with higher rate{color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Coverage + Mixed Rate Change (multiple rates for same shift type; no new shift type added)*{color}
** {color:#403294}Only shift changes No new shift type record created, no new rate (same rare as an existing rate for that shift type){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Coverage with Signature*{color}
** {color:#403294}Only new Shift Bonus ( handled as part of structure changes){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Rate Change (Stipend and Leadership Incentives)*{color}
** {color:#403294}Addendum B (all changes, increase or decrease){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*Rate Change (shift, variable, bonus) - Addendum A with Signature*{color}
** {color:#403294}Rate Change that require signature Variable ( RVU or Encounter plan) have Addendum A (includes rate reductions and structure changes i.e. new shift type){color}
{color:#403294}Addendum A for shift, variable,{color}
{color:#403294}Addendum A2 is for Bonus (only Clinician side){color}
* {color:#403294}Type of Change: {color}{color:#403294}*NPPA Tier Change (Coverage)*{color}
** {color:#403294}change in facility level committed hours 120 to 140 hours ]{color}

--

{color:#403294}Then the system shall generate one task for each of the affected HPFs:{color}

* {color:#403294}Task record type: Default{color}
* {color:#403294}Assigned To: Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist{color}
* {color:#403294}Subject: Create New Clinician Contract for [Clinician’s Name]{color}
* {color:#403294}Comments: “New Practice Operations Contract Start Date = [Contract Start Date]”{color}
* {color:#403294}Name: [Clinician]{color}
* {color:#403294}Related To: [Client Change Management]{color}

{color:#403294}NOTE: {color}

* {color:#403294}if no Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then set to Contract Owner. {color}
* {color:#403294}In a normal setup, there should only be one CET team member{color}
* {color:#403294}If there is MORE than one Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then select the most recently added. {color}

----

Original AC

--AC1: Rate Change - Signature Required--
-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
-And there was a change to Rates:-

*-Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-*

-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

--AC2: Rate Change - Leadership (Signature Required)--

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
-And there was a change to Rates:-

*-Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-*

-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

--AC3: Coverage Change - NPPA Tier Change (Signature Required)--

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
--And there was a change to Coverage –- *-NPPA Tier Change-*-:-
-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

-AC4: Coverage Change with New Shift Bonus Added-
-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a Client Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status gets updated to ‘Executed’-
--And there was a change to Coverage –- *-New Shift Bonus Added:-*
-Then the system shall:-

* --A <task> is created for Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist--
** -Subject: Create New Clinician Contract-

*-And if multiple criteria are met, with the same effective date, only one task is created-*

-NOTE:-

* --if no Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then set to Contract Owner.--
* -In a normal setup, there should only be one CET team member-
* --If there is MORE than one Account Team - Clinician Experience Specialist, then select the most recently added.-- 		31/Oct/25 1:10 PM   7 image-20251024-080331.png 05/Aug/25 7:24 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 04/Sep/25 2:59 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzlzzzcrzzx 10/Feb/26 12:30 PM As a SFO, when the Contract (RT: Practice Operations) Status is set to “Executed”, then I want the system to perform automated actions, so that downstream updates/processes can begin. 15/Oct/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3079, PR1050558-3143, PR1050558-3285 Record Triggered Flow for Update in PMT Task object

# When the Status of inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Status__c = “In Progress”
## Get the PMT Task Name of the inov8__PMT_Task__c.Name and query for matching name in ActionPlanTemplateVersion to find the version Id
### Use SOQL as reference SELECT Id,ActionPlanTemplateId,ActivationDateTime, ActionPlanTemplate.ActionPlanType, ActionPlanTemplate.Name FROM ActionPlanTemplateVersion WHERE ActionPlanTemplate.Name = inov8__PMT_Task__c.Name AND Status = 'Final' Order By ActivationDateTime DESC LIMIT 1
### If no records found then throw error message “Unable to find Published Action Plan Template with the name that matches PMT Task Name. Review Action Plan Template Setup and try again.” and stop the update.
## Create the Action Plan Record with fields below
### ActionPlanTemplateVersionId = ActionPlanTemplateId from ActionPlanTemplateVersion in above query
### ActionPlanType = ActionPlanTemplate.ActionPlanType from ActionPlanTemplateVersion in above query
### Name = ActionPlanTemplate.Name from ActionPlanTemplateVersion in above query
### Start Date = Today
### TargetId = inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Phase__r.Service_Account__c
## Update the inov8__PMT_Task__c with related data
### *Total Tasks* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.Total_Tasks__c) = Select Count(Id) from Task WHERE Id in (
SELECT ItemId FROM ActionPlanItem WHERE ActionPlanId = [from step 1.b] and ItemEntityType = 'Task')
### *# of Completed Tasks* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.No_of_Completed_Tasks__c) = o (hard code)
### *End Date* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Due_Date__c) = Select ActivityDate from Task WHERE Id in (
SELECT ItemId FROM ActionPlanItem WHERE ActionPlanId = '07r7x000000GxLtAAK' and ItemEntityType = 'Task') order by ActivityDate DESC LIMIT 1
### Start Date (inov8__PMT_Task__c.inov8__Start_Date__c) = Today
### *Related Action Plan* (inov8__PMT_Task__c.Related_Action_Plan__c) = Get Action Plan Id once the Record is created in step b and store in inov8__PMT_Task__c.Related_Action_Plan__c



User should have access to Action Plan Template can only be able to perform the operation of making the Status = In Progress otherwise need to revisit how the flow is run (System Context) 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto create tasks
Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
And I created a PMT Project for the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth)
And I “Clone Phase/Tasks” for each Service Account
When I am on a PMT Task
And I update the “Task Status” = “In Progress”
Then the system shall automatically:

* Link the Action Plan Template with the same name as the “Task Name”
** Populate the NEW read only (Layout) “*Related Action Plan*” lookup field with Action Plan Template
* Trigger the auto creation of the Action Plan task record(s).
* Populate *‘Start Date’* = <Date the PMT Task Status was set to “In Progress”>
* Populate *‘End Date'* = <Due Date of the Last task (find the task with the max/latest Due Date) based on the task created within the Action Plan Template>
* Populate ‘*Total Tasks*’ (NEW, read only, number) = <populate with number of tasks from Action Plan Template>
* Populate ‘*# of Completed Tasks*’ (NEW, read only, number) = <populate as Action Plan template tasks are completed update the number>

Create a task record as specified in the AC 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Auto Task Creation to Create PMT Project
Given I am a Implementation Specialist in the Corporate Support Apps
When the Client Contract (RT: Client Contract) Status is updated to “Executed” [NOTE: Legal team is responsible for setting Status = Executed per story [+PR1050558-3351+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3351]]
And “PMT Project” field is not populated
Then the system shall automatically create a *Task* to notify the users assigned to the “Implementation Queue” to create a new PMT Project:

* Record Type = Default
* Subject = Create a PMT Project for <Opportunity Name>
* Assigned To = Implementation Queue
* -Comments = 1. Please create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity 2. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 3. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”-
* Comments = 1. Create a new PMT Project for the Opportunity from PMT Template 2. Associate the Opportunity to the PMT Project record 3. “Clone Phases/Tasks” for each Service Account 4. For each PMT Phase associate the Service Account 5. When ready to send out the related tasks, update the PMT Task Status = “In Progress”
* Status = Open (default)
* Due Date =<+5 days from date of creation>
* Type = Client Onboarding
* Priority = Normal (default)
* Related To = <Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity )>

NOTE: if the criteria is met we will create a task, user can manually close (canceled) if they have not populated the “PMT Project” and a duplicate task is created. 		03/Nov/25 2:26 PM   5 image-20251010-113300.png 05/Aug/25 5:31 PM SCP Sprint 11, SCP Sprint 12 25/Sep/25 10:59 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzlzzr 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As an Implementation Specialist, when the Client Contract Status = Executed, I want a task to be automatically created for our team, so we know to manually create the PMT Project & Clone the Phases/Tasks which will be used to track the onboarding process for each Service Account. 10/Oct/25

Create the action Buttons in PMT Phase

# ‘SUN - Preliminary’
# ‘SUN - Revision’
# ‘SUN - Final’

Upon clicking the button check if the Service Account (inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c)

* is blank “Error as per AC”
* if Service Account is available then check if
** Already a case for that PMT is available for that type then do not create a new case else create a new case based on button selected as per AC

-Custom field on Client onboarding CASE - “SUN Status“ - picklist: Not Started, Ready, In Progress, Completed- 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Create Case for SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Update’, or ‘SUN - Complete’
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a PMT project exists
Then from the *PMT Phase* I have the ability to create a *Case* for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ (3 actions/buttons)
And system shall check if “Service Account” field is populated on PMT Phase:

* If yes, then proceed
* If no, user can not proceed
** Display error: ‘Service Account’ field must be populated to proceed
** Available navigation actions:
*** Cancel (“X” icon)
**** Guided experience is closed
**** User is returned to the PMT Phase
**** No case or tasks are created

And if Service Account is populated, then the system shall display:

* Message: By clicking Finish the system shall automatically create new tasks & send the <Dynamically populate based on selection: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ > email. If there are any open tasks, they will be automatically closed and new tasks shall be created.

And available navigation options:

* Cancel (“X” icon)
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the PMT Phase
** No case or tasks are created
* Finish
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the PMT Phase

And upon clicking Finish:

* If the *Case* for the selected Type *does Not exist* then:
** New Case is created
*** Case Record Type = ‘Client Onboarding’ (*NEW*)
*** Subject = <Type> for <Account Name (Service Account)>
*** Case Owner = <user who initiated the case>
*** Type = <based on button selected: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ >
*** Status = 'Not Started'
*** Case Origin = ‘Manual’
*** Priority = ‘Medium’
*** PMT Phase = <PMT Phase>
*** Account Name = <'Service Account' from PMT Phase>
** -Tasks are created based on [part of story- [+-PR1050558-886-+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-886]-] – [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
* If the *Case* for the selected Type *does exist* then:
** NO new Case is created
** -Existing Tasks in Status = 'Open' are automatically updated to Status = ‘Canceled’- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
** -New Tasks are automatically created based on [part of story- [+-PR1050558-886-+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-886]-]- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
* -And send the SUN Email notification [part of story- [+-PR1050558-887-+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-887]-]- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+

-AC2: Auto Update the PMT Case Status- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
-Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps-
-When a- *-PMT Case-* --for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’ has been created for a PMT Phase--
-Then the system shall automatically update the PMT Case Status:-

* -Update ‘Status’ = ‘In Progress’, when there are open related tasks (Status = ‘Open’)-
* -Update ‘Status’ = ‘Closed’, once ALL related tasks are updated to closed (Status = ‘Complete' or ‘Canceled’)-

-AC3: Ability to view Tasks from the PMT Case- [Split to [+PR1050558-3517+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3517]+]+
-Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I navigate to a- *-PMT Case-* --for: ‘SUN - Preliminary’, ‘SUN - Revision’, or ‘SUN - Final’--
-Then I have the ability to view the related tasks-

No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3151, PR1050558-3087, PR1050558-3287, PR1050558-3476 Query 1: SOQL Select Services_Sold__c, Leased_Employee__c, If_Leased_Employees_Ins_Provided_By__c, Client_Statup_Date__c, Facility_Start_Up_Time__c, Client_Start_Up_Time_Zone__c, ContractId FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Master” AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.SourceOpportunityId = inov8__PMT_Phase__r.inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c AND ProviderNetworkContract*.Service_Account__c* = inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c {color:#ff991f}AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Agreement_Category__c = “Facility Agreement”{color} Order By ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1

–> ContractId in Query 1 is the Master Contract Id (used as ParentContractId in all Child contract records)

Query 2: Select -Related-Account.Name, PartyRoleRelation.RoleName FROM AccountAccountRelation WHERE *Realted*AccountId = inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c AND PartyRoleRelationId = (Select Id from PartyRoleRelation where RoleName = “Client Owner” OR RoleName = “Services Contracting Entity” ) AND StartDate <= Today() AND (EndDate IS NOT NULL OR EndDate >= Today()) Order By StartDate DESC LIMIT 1)

Query 3: Select ED_Volume__c, HM_Volume__c, TeleMedicine__c, Insurance_Limits_per_Occurrence__c, Insurance_Limits_Aggregate__c FROM Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail__c WHERE Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail__c.Model__r.Opportunity__c = inov8__PMT_Phase__r.inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c AND Pro_Forma_Facility_Detail__c.Model__r.Status__c = “Approved for Contracting” Order BY Created DESC LIMIT 1)

-Query 4: SOQL Select Occurrence_Limit__c, Annual_Aggregate__c, Leased_Employee__c FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Contract_Type__c = “Insurance” AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.SourceOpportunityId = inov8__PMT_Phase__r.inov8__Project__r.Opportunity__c AND ProviderNetworkContract.-*-Service_Account__c-* -= inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__c AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.ParentContractId = Query1.ContractId- {color:#ff991f}-AND ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.Agreement_Category__c = “Facility Agreement”-{color} -Order By ProviderNetworkContract.Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1-

Query 4 Fixed in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4051|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4051|smart-link]



Update flow Create PMT Cases to include email step with below fields

Account Name: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Name

Service Line: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Service_Line__r.Name

Global Facility ID: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Global_Facility_ID__c

Services Sold: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Services_Sold__c (*For Final:* Query1.Services_Sold__c)

Physical Address: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingStreet, inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingCity, inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingStateCode, inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Parent.BillingPostalCode

Phone: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Phone

Client Owner: Query2.RelatedAccount.Name WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = “Client Owner”

Client Owner Type: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Client_Owner_Type__c

Facility Short Name: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Facility_Short_Name__c

Annual ED Billable Volume - Pro Forma: Query3.ED_Volume__c

Annual HM Patient Encounters - Pro Forma: Query3.HM_Volume__c

Tele Services Active - Pro Forma: Query3.TeleMedicine__c from above query >0 then Yes else No

Leased Employees: inov8__PMT_Phase__r.Leased_Employees__c (*For Final:* Query1.Leased_Employee__c)

If Leased Employees Ins Provided By: inov8__PMT_Phase__r.If_Leased_Employees_Ins_Provided_By__c (*For Final:* Query1.If_Leased_Employees_Ins_Provided_By__c)

Medical Malpractice Insurance Limits per Occurrence {color:#bf2600}- {color}Pro Forma: Query3.Insurance_Limits_per_Occurrence__c

Medical Malpractice Insurance Limits per Occurrence: *For Final:* Query4.Occurrence_Limit__c

Medical Malpractice Insurance Aggregate - Pro Forma: Query3.Insurance_Limits_Aggregate__c

Medical Malpractice Insurance Aggregate: *For Final:* Query4.Annual_Aggregate__c

Insurance Provided By: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Insurance_Provided_By__c

Corporate Entity: Query2.RelatedAccount.Name WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = “Services Contracting Entity”

Client Start Up Date: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Client_Start_Up_Date__c (For Final: Query1.Client_Statup_Date__c )

Client Start Up Time: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Client_Start_Up_Time__c (For Final: Query1.Facility_Start_Up_Time__c )

Client Start Up Time Zone: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Client_Start_Up_Time_Zone__c (For Final: Query1.Client_Start_Up_Time_Zone__c )

Billing Company: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Billing_Company__c

Staffing Team: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Staffing_Team__c

Client Division: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Client_Division__c

Client Region: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Client_Region__c

Position being Recruited: inov8__PMT_Phase__c.Service_Account__r.Position_being_Recruited__c

Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a ‘SUN - Final’ PMT Case is created
Then the system shall send an email:

* *Recipient*: email distribution list [DL.Notice Of Operations Changes [DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com|mailto:DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com]] - *PROD*
* *Subject*: FINAL Startup Notification - <Service Account>
* *Body*:

Hello All,

Please see the FINAL startup notification for the following site:
<Display the Service Account Name as clickable link to Service Account record>

<Display - see *Fields to be visible in the Email.* _In the table there are a few fields that are prefixed with “_*_FINAL_*_”, use those labels and field mapping to populate the value._ >

Any future changes to be managed by field operations via client management functions.

Thank you



AC2: PRELIMINARY Startup Notification

Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a ‘SUN - Preliminary’ PMT Case is created
Then the system shall send an email:

* *Recipient*: email distribution list [DL.Notice Of Operations Changes [DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com|mailto:DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com]] - *PROD*
* *Subject*: Preliminary Startup Notification - <Service Account>
* *Body*:

Hello All,

Please see the PRELIMINARY startup notification for the following site:
<Display the Service Account Name as clickable link to Service Account record>

<Display - see *Fields to be visible in the Email*>

Thank you


AC3: REVISION to Startup Notification
Given I am a Implementation Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When a ‘SUN - Revision’ PMT Case is created
Then the system shall send an email:

* *Recipient*: email distribution list [DL.Notice Of Operations Changes [DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com|mailto:DL.NoticeOfOperationsChanges@scp-health.com]] - *PROD*
* *Subject*: REVISION to Startup Notification - <Service Account>
* *Body*:

Hello All,

Please see the REVISION to the startup notification for the following sites:
<Display the Service Account Name as clickable link to Service Account record>

<Display - see *Fields to be visible in the Email*>

Thank you



NOTE: Assumption - the distribution list is managed in Outlook

----

*Fields to be visible in the Email*

||*Name to display*||*Value to display*||
|-Account / Hospital Name- Account Name|Service Account: Account Name|
|Service Line|Service Account: Service Line|
|Global Facility ID|Service Account: Global Facility ID|
|-Parent Account / Hospital- Parent Account|Service Account: Parent Account|
|Services Sold|PMT Phase: Services Sold (*NEW*) - use global picklist
*FINAL*: Client Contract > PNC: Services Sold|
|Physical Address
<City>
<State>
<Zip>|Facility/Hospital Account: Physical Address|
|Phone|Service Account: Phone|
|Client Owner|Account Account Relationship: Party Role Relationship = Client Owner|
|Client Owner Type|Service Account: Client Owner Type|
|Facility Short Name|Facility/Hospital Account: Facility Short Name|
|Annual ED Billable Volume - Pro Forma|Pro Froma Facility Detail: ED Volume|
|Annual HM Patient Encounters - Pro Forma|Pro Froma Facility Detail: HM Volume|
|Tele Services Active - Pro Forma|Display “Yes” if “TeleMedicine”is Greater than '0'|
|Leased Employees|PMT Phase: Leased Employees (*NEW*)
*FINAL*: Client Contract > PNC: Leased Employees (*NEW*) type checkbox (unchecked by default)|
|If Leased Employees Ins Provided By|PMT Phase: If Leased Employees Ins Provided By (*NEW*)
*FINAL*: Client Contract > PNC: If Leased Employees Ins Provided By|
|Medical Malpractice Insurance Limits per Occurrence {color:#bf2600}- {color}Pro Forma
*FINAL display*: Medical Malpractice Insurance Limits per Occurrence|Pro Forma Facility Detail: Insurance Limits per Occurrence (*NEW*)
*FINAL*: Client Contract: Occurrence Limit
Note: agreed that the user populating the Pro Forma Facility Details template, will split out the “Insurance Limits” field into it’s respective Pro Forma Facility Details field in the template|
|Medical Malpractice Insurance Aggregate - Pro Forma
*FINAL display*: Medical Malpractice Insurance Aggregate|Pro Forma Facility Detail: Insurance Limits Aggregate (*NEW*)
*FINAL*: Client Contract: Annual Aggregate
See note in “Medical Malpractice Insurance Limits per Occurrence” field.|
|Insurance Provided By|Service Account: Insurance Provided By|
|Corporate Entity|Account Account Relationship: Party Role Relationship = ‘ ‘Services Contracting Entity’|
|Client Start Up Date|PMT Phase: Client Start Up Date (*NEW*)
*FINAL*: Client Contract > PNC: Client Start Up Date|
|Client Start Up Time|PMT Phase: Client Start Up Time (*NEW*)
*FINAL*: Client Contract > PNC: Client Start Up Time|
|Client Start Up Time Zone|PMT Phase: Client Start Up Time Zone (*NEW*)
*FINAL*: Client Contract > PNC: Client Start Up Time Zone|
|Billing Company|Service Account: Billing Company|
|Staffing Team|Service Account: Staffing Team|
|Client Division|Service Account: Client Division|
|Client Region|Service Account: Client Region|
|Position being Recruited|Service Account: Position being Recruited|

* Look into updating the Org Wide address to be an SCP (outlook email) document any needed setup steps --- [*-no-reply-sf@scphealth.com-*|mailto:no-reply-sf@scphealth.com] -(can be verified)- From User for EMAIL → When Approving: User Email, When Rejecting: User Email
* For Final Email - Approved or Rejected:
*# Subject = <Pro Forma Model Name> is now <Pro Forma Status (“Model Confirmed”, “Approved for Contracting”, or “Rejected”)>
*# Body = <Pro Forma Model Name (link to record)> is now <Pro Forma Status (“Model Confirmed”, “Approved for Contracting”, or “Rejected”)> 		0 Kristin Koide 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app
When I navigate to a Pro Forma Model record
And on the Pro Forma Model *Comment’s field is NOT populated*
Then when I click *Submit for Confirmation* OR *Submit for Contracting,* the system shall display the following message: Please add a comment to the Pro Forma Model before submitting for confirmation or contracting.
And user can not proceed.

Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app
When I navigate to a Pro Forma Model record
And on the Pro Forma Model *Comment’s field is populated*
Then I am able to click *Submit for Confirmation* OR *Submit for Contracting*

And then the following automatically happens:

Criteria/thresholds:

* Submit for Confirmation AND Submit for Contracting:
** If all of the following criteria are met, follow *Offline Approval* path
*** -Not a Current Client: If no Contract records exist where Status = Executed-
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c._Current_Client__c = FALSE
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.Encounter_Level_Data__c = TRUE
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.Med_Mal_Limits_Unique__c = FALSE
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.Gross_Margin__c is less than or equal to $2,500,000
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.Gross_Margin_Percent__c is greater than or equal to 10%
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.At_Risk_of_Margin__c is less than or equal to 5%
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.New_State__c = FALSE
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.Financial_Contract_Type__c = Guaranteed Management Fee ($)
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.Compensation_Buffer__c = -TRUE- is greater than or equal to 5%
*** Pro_Forma_Model__c.Physician_Comp__c = FALSE
** If Offline Approval criteria above are not met, follow *DAM Approval* path
* Pro Forma Model record is locked from being edited
* In Approval Process checkbox on Pro Forma Model is checked
* Approval Work Item records are created for the following approvers:
** *Offline Approval* path and *DAM Approval* path
*** Step 1
**** Role = VP BD Finance
*** Step 2 (approval within this step is parallel)
**** Role = COO
**** Role = CFO
**** Role = SVP Growth
**** Deal Team Role *= “Chief Medical Officer - HM”.* Story for Deal Team Role updates [+PR1050558-2081+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2081])
***** If there are more than one team member in this role, then send to the most recently added.
***** If NO team member has been added, then do NOT sent approval for Chief Medical Officer.
**** Deal Team Role = *“Chief Medical Officer - EM”.* Story for Deal Team Role updates [+PR1050558-2081+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2081])
***** If there are more than one team member in this role, then send to the most recently added.
***** If NO team member has been added, then do NOT sent approval for Chief Medical Officer.
***** NOTE: the Sales VP is responsible for adding the correct CMO(s) to the Opportunity/Deal Team. When approvals are sent, we will send the approval to Chief Medical Officers based on which role has been added *-ALL-* *-Chief Medical Officer-*-(s)- on the Opportunity/Deal Team.
** Approval steps are sequential
** Within each step - *all* users must approve (*unanimous)*
* Approval Actions
** Pro Forma Model record is unlocked from being edited
** Email alert to submitter and approvers
** Update Pro Forma Model field = *Status* based on button selection:
*** Submit for Confirmation, then set to “Model Confirmed”
*** Submit for Contracting, then set to “Approved for Contracting”
** Update the Opportunity field = *Pro Forma Status* (NEW field) based on the button selection:
*** Submit for Confirmation, then set to “Model Confirmed”
*** Submit for Contracting, then set to “Approved for Contracting”
** On the Opportunity, can you view a list of all Pro Forma Models and Pro Forma Model ‘Status’ (to view each approval work item, go to Pro Forma Model and review Related tab)
* Rejection Actions
** Pro Forma Model record is unlocked for editing
** Email alert to submitter and VP Sales Ops (NOTE: this story will just send to 1 user in the role = VP Sales Operations. 11/7 got confirmation that there are at least 2 VP Sales Operations, so will create a new story to send the Rejection email to a distribution list)
** Pro Forma Model Status changes to “Rejected”
** Opportunity Pro Forma Status changed to “Iteration Rejected”
** Approval Comments are visible on Approval History related list
* Allow Email Approvals
** Sender email = user who submitted the approval
** Subject = Approval Request for <insert Pro Forma Model “Name” field>
** Body =
Hello,

A new Pro Forma Model has been submitted for your review and approval. Please see the details below.

**Pro Forma Model Summary:*

* -Not a Current Client-
* *Is this a current client?*: Pro_Forma_Model__c._Current_Client__c
* *Encounter Level Data Provided?*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Encounter_Level_Data__c
* *Unique Med Mal Limits?*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Med_Mal_Limits_Unique__c
* *Gross Margin*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Gross_Margin__c
* *Gross Margin Percentage*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Gross_Margin_Percent__c
* *At Risk of Margin*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.At_Risk_of_Margin__c
* *Operating in a new state?*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.New_State__c
* *Financial Contract Type*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Financial_Contract_Type__c
* *Compensation Buffer*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Compensation_Buffer__c
* *Physician Compensation*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Physician_Comp__c
* *Comments*: Pro_Forma_Model__c.Comments__c (pull from user’s manually inputed comments within the Pro Forma Model)

Please review the Pro Forma Model details and approve or reject this request <insert link to Pro Forma Model record - note user will click “request”>.

Thank you.

Instead of opening the record, you can just reply to this email. To approve this request, the first line of your reply must include one of these keywords: APPROVE, APPROVED, YES.
To reject this request, the first line of your reply must include one of these keywords: REJECT, REJECTED, NO.
When you approve or reject by replying to this email, you can also add comments to the second line of your reply. These comments are stored with the approval work item.

*
** Approver shall have two options:
*** Reply to this email with one of these words in the first line of the email message: APPROVE, APPROVED, YES, REJECT, REJECTED, or NO. Add comments on the second line. Comments will be stored with the approval request in Salesforce CRM.
*** Click on a link which will take them to the approval request to allow them to select Approve or Reject within the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app.

Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app

When I navigate to an Opportunity record
And I already initiated Submit for Confirmation OR Submit for Contracting
And I am waiting for an approval
Then I can recall my approval request
